papers.title: Teaching Language Models How to Code Like Learners: Conversational Serialization for Student Simulation
papers.abstract: Artificial models that simulate how learners act and respond within educational systems are a promising tool for evaluating tutoring strategies and feedback mechanisms at scale. However, many existing approaches in programming education rely on prompting large, proprietary language models, raising concerns around privacy, cost, and dependence. In this work, we propose a method for training open-weight artificial programming learners using authentic student process data. Our approach serializes temporal log traces into a conversational format, representing each student's problem-solving process as a dialogue between the learner and their automated assessment system. Student code submissions and environment feedback, such as test outcomes, grades, and error traces, form alternating conversational turns, enabling models to learn from the iterative debugging process. We additionally introduce a training pipeline combining supervised fine-tuning with preference optimization to align models with authentic student debugging behavior. We evaluate our framework by training Qwen models at 4B and 8B scales on a large-scale dataset of real student submissions to Python programming assignments. Our results show that incorporating environment feedback strengthens the models' ability to replicate student debugging behavior, improving over both prior code-only approaches and prompted large language models baselines in functional alignment and code similarity. We release our code to support reproducibility.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种将学生编程过程日志转换为对话格式的方法，训练开源模型模拟学生调试行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模拟学生行为的模型依赖大型专有API，存在隐私、成本和依赖性问题，需要一种基于开源模型且利用真实学生过程数据的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用真实学生的编程过程数据（包括代码提交和环境反馈）训练开源语言模型，使其能够逼真地模拟学生的调试行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将时间序列日志转换为对话格式（学生代码提交与环境反馈交替作为对话轮次），结合监督微调和偏好优化训练开源模型。
contributions: 提出一种对话序列化方法，将学生编程过程日志转化为对话格式，用于训练学生模拟模型。
引入结合监督微调和偏好优化的训练流程，使模型对齐真实学生的调试行为。
在4B和8B规模的Qwen模型上验证，表明环境反馈能提升模型模拟学生调试行为的能力，优于纯代码方法和提示大型语言模型基线。
analysis.experiments: 在包含真实学生Python编程作业提交的大规模数据集上训练Qwen 4B和8B模型，评估功能对齐和代码相似性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于编程教育场景，泛化性未知。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种将学生编程过程日志转换为对话格式的方法，训练开源模型模拟学生调试行为。

papers.title: SciPredict: Can LLMs Predict the Outcomes of Scientific Experiments in Natural Sciences?
papers.abstract: Accelerating scientific discovery requires the identification of which experiments would yield the best outcomes before committing resources to costly physical validation. While existing benchmarks evaluate LLMs on scientific knowledge and reasoning, their ability to predict experimental outcomes - a task where AI could significantly exceed human capabilities - remains largely underexplored. We introduce SciPredict, a benchmark comprising 405 tasks derived from recent empirical studies in 33 specialized sub-fields of physics, biology, and chemistry. SciPredict addresses two critical questions: (a) can LLMs predict the outcome of scientific experiments with sufficient accuracy? and (b) can such predictions be reliably used in the scientific research process? Evaluations reveal fundamental limitations on both fronts. Model accuracies are 14-26% and human expert performance is $\approx$20%. Although some frontier models exceed human performance model accuracy is still far below what would enable reliable experimental guidance. Even within the limited performance, models fail to distinguish reliable predictions from unreliable ones, achieving only $\approx$20% accuracy regardless of their confidence or whether they judge outcomes as predictable without physical experimentation. Human experts, in contrast, demonstrate strong calibration: their accuracy increases from $\approx$5% to $\approx$80% as they deem outcomes more predictable without conducting the experiment. SciPredict establishes a rigorous framework demonstrating that superhuman performance in experimental science requires not just better predictions, but better awareness of prediction reliability. For reproducibility all our data and code are provided at https://github.com/scaleapi/scipredict

analysis.tldr: LLM在自然科学实验预测上准确率仅14-26%，且无法区分可靠与不可靠预测，远未达到实用水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 加速科学发现需要提前识别哪些实验能产生最佳结果，但现有基准只评估LLM的知识和推理能力，未探索其预测实验结果的潜力，而AI在这一任务上可能超越人类。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM预测自然科学实验结果的准确性及其在科研过程中的可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM预测准确率仅14-26%，人类专家约20%；前沿模型虽略超人类，但远低于可靠指导实验的水平；LLM无法区分可靠与不可靠预测，置信度与准确性无关，而人类专家校准良好（从5%到80%）。
analysis.method: 构建SciPredict基准，包含来自物理、生物、化学33个细分领域的405个任务，评估LLM预测实验结果的准确性及校准能力。
contributions: 提出SciPredict基准，系统评估LLM在自然科学实验预测上的能力。
揭示LLM在预测准确性和可靠性校准上的根本局限，强调超越人类表现需要更好的预测可靠性意识。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM和人类专家上评估，模型准确率14-26%，人类约20%；LLM校准差，人类校准良好。
limitations: 基准任务数量有限（405个），可能未覆盖所有科学领域。
未探讨如何提升LLM的预测可靠性或校准能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 新颖的基准和重要发现，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在自然科学实验预测上准确率仅14-26%，且无法区分可靠与不可靠预测，远未达到实用水平。

papers.title: Detecting RAG Extraction Attack via Dual-Path Runtime Integrity Game
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems augment large language models with external knowledge, yet introduce a critical security vulnerability: RAG Knowledge Base Leakage, wherein adversarial prompts can induce the model to divulge retrieved proprietary content. Recent studies reveal that such leakage can be executed through adaptive and iterative attack strategies (named RAG extraction attack), while effective countermeasures remain notably lacking. To bridge this gap, we propose CanaryRAG, a runtime defense mechanism inspired by stack canaries in software security. CanaryRAG embeds carefully designed canary tokens into retrieved chunks and reformulates RAG extraction defense as a dual-path runtime integrity game. Leakage is detected in real time whenever either the target or oracle path violates its expected canary behavior, including under adaptive suppression and obfuscation. Extensive evaluations against existing attacks demonstrate that CanaryRAG provides robust defense, achieving substantially lower chunk recovery rates than state-of-the-art baselines while imposing negligible impact on task performance and inference latency. Moreover, as a plug-and-play solution, CanaryRAG can be seamlessly integrated into arbitrary RAG pipelines without requiring retraining or structural modifications, offering a practical and scalable safeguard for proprietary data.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种类似软件栈金丝雀的运行时防御机制，通过双路径完整性博弈实时检测RAG知识库泄露攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG系统存在知识库泄露漏洞，现有攻击方法日益复杂而有效防御手段匮乏，亟需实用且可扩展的运行时防护方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不影响任务性能和推理延迟的前提下，实时检测并防御针对RAG系统的提取攻击（包括自适应抑制和混淆攻击）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计金丝雀令牌嵌入检索块，构建目标路径与预言路径的双路径运行时完整性博弈，当任一路径违反预期金丝雀行为时实时检测泄露。
contributions: 提出CanaryRAG，首个受软件栈金丝雀启发的RAG运行时防御机制
将RAG提取防御形式化为双路径运行时完整性博弈，支持实时检测
实验证明在极低任务性能影响和推理延迟下，显著降低块恢复率
analysis.experiments: 在现有攻击下评估，CanaryRAG相比基线实现更低的块恢复率，且对任务性能和推理延迟影响可忽略。
limitations: 可能依赖金丝雀令牌的不可预测性，若攻击者能识别并移除金丝雀则防御可能失效
仅针对提取攻击，未覆盖其他类型的RAG安全威胁
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验充分，与安全对齐方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种类似软件栈金丝雀的运行时防御机制，通过双路径完整性博弈实时检测RAG知识库泄露攻击。

papers.title: Defending against Patch-Based and Texture-Based Adversarial Attacks with Spectral Decomposition
papers.abstract: Adversarial examples present significant challenges to the security of Deep Neural Network (DNN) applications. Specifically, there are patch-based and texture-based attacks that are usually used to craft physical-world adversarial examples, posing real threats to security-critical applications such as person detection in surveillance and autonomous systems, because those attacks are physically realizable. Existing defense mechanisms face challenges in the adaptive attack setting, i.e., the attacks are specifically designed against them. In this paper, we propose Adversarial Spectrum Defense (ASD), a defense mechanism that leverages spectral decomposition via Discrete Wavelet Transform (DWT) to analyze adversarial patterns across multiple frequency scales. The multi-resolution and localization capability of DWT enables ASD to capture both high-frequency (fine-grained) and low-frequency (spatially pervasive) perturbations. By integrating this spectral analysis with the off-the-shelf Adversarial Training (AT) model, ASD provides a comprehensive defense strategy against both patch-based and texture-based adversarial attacks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ASD+AT achieved state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance against various attacks, outperforming the APs of previous defense methods by 21.73%, in the face of strong adaptive adversaries specifically designed against ASD. Code available at https://github.com/weiz0823/adv-spectral-defense .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于离散小波变换的频谱分解防御方法ASD，结合对抗训练，在自适应攻击下显著提升防御性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于补丁和纹理的物理可实现对抗攻击对DNN安全构成严重威胁，现有防御在自适应攻击设置下效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何有效防御物理世界中基于补丁和纹理的对抗攻击，特别是在攻击者针对防御机制进行自适应设计的情况下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Adversarial Spectrum Defense (ASD)，利用离散小波变换进行频谱分解，在多频率尺度上分析对抗模式，并结合现成的对抗训练模型。
contributions: 提出ASD防御机制，利用DWT的多分辨率和定位能力捕获高频和低频扰动。
ASD+AT在多种攻击下达到SOTA性能，平均精度提升21.73%，且能抵抗针对ASD设计的强自适应攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在多种攻击下进行实验，ASD+AT的APs比先前防御方法提升21.73%，且能抵抗针对ASD设计的自适应攻击。
limitations: 可能依赖特定对抗训练模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
计算开销可能因DWT引入而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，在自适应攻击下显著提升防御性能，与安全鲁棒性方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于离散小波变换的频谱分解防御方法ASD，结合对抗训练，在自适应攻击下显著提升防御性能。

papers.title: UniMark: Unified Adaptive Multi-bit Watermarking for Autoregressive Image Generators
papers.abstract: Invisible watermarking for autoregressive (AR) image generation has recently gained attention as a means of protecting image ownership and tracing AI-generated content. However, existing approaches suffer from three key limitations: (1) they embed only zero-bit watermarks for binary verification, lacking the ability to convey multi-bit messages; (2) they rely on static codebook partitioning strategies that are vulnerable to security attacks once the partition is exposed; and (3) they are designed for specific AR architectures, failing to generalize across diverse AR paradigms. We propose \method{}, a training-free, unified watermarking framework for autoregressive image generators that addresses all three limitations. \method{} introduces three core components: \textbf{Adaptive Semantic Grouping (ASG)}, which dynamically partitions codebook entries based on semantic similarity and a secret key, ensuring both image quality preservation and security; \textbf{Block-wise Multi-bit Encoding (BME)}, which divides the token sequence into blocks and encodes different bits across blocks with error-correcting codes for reliable message transmission; and \textbf{a Unified Token-Replacement Interface (UTRI)} that abstracts the watermark embedding process to support both next-token prediction (e.g., LlamaGen) and next-scale prediction (e.g., VAR) paradigms. We provide theoretical analysis on detection error rates and embedding capacity. Extensive experiments on three AR models demonstrate that \method{} achieves state-of-the-art performance in image quality (FID), watermark detection accuracy, and multi-bit message extraction, while maintaining robustness against cropping, JPEG compression, Gaussian noise, blur, color jitter, and random erasing attacks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的统一自适应多比特水印框架UniMark，用于自回归图像生成器的版权保护。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自回归图像生成器的水印方法只能嵌入零比特用于二元验证，缺乏多比特消息能力；依赖静态码本分区易受攻击；且针对特定架构设计，泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何为自回归图像生成器设计一种无需训练、统一、安全且支持多比特消息的隐形水印方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UniMark框架，包含三个核心组件：自适应语义分组（ASG）基于语义相似性和密钥动态划分码本；块级多比特编码（BME）将令牌序列分块并跨块编码不同比特，结合纠错码；统一令牌替换接口（UTRI）抽象水印嵌入过程，支持下一令牌预测和下一尺度预测范式。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练的统一多比特水印框架，适用于多种自回归图像生成范式。
引入自适应语义分组和块级多比特编码，兼顾图像质量、安全性和消息容量。
提供检测错误率和嵌入容量的理论分析，并在三个AR模型上取得SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个自回归图像生成模型上进行实验，评估图像质量（FID）、水印检测准确率、多比特消息提取，以及针对裁剪、JPEG压缩、高斯噪声、模糊、颜色抖动和随机擦除攻击的鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对极端攻击（如强几何变换）的鲁棒性有限。
多比特编码的容量受令牌序列长度和块数限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，解决了现有水印的多比特、安全性和泛化问题，实验全面，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的统一自适应多比特水印框架UniMark，用于自回归图像生成器的版权保护。

papers.title: Audio-Omni: Extending Multi-modal Understanding to Versatile Audio Generation and Editing
papers.abstract: Recent progress in multimodal models has spurred rapid advances in audio understanding, generation, and editing. However, these capabilities are typically addressed by specialized models, leaving the development of a truly unified framework that can seamlessly integrate all three tasks underexplored. While some pioneering works have explored unifying audio understanding and generation, they often remain confined to specific domains. To address this, we introduce Audio-Omni, the first end-to-end framework to unify generation and editing across general sound, music, and speech domains, with integrated multi-modal understanding capabilities. Our architecture synergizes a frozen Multimodal Large Language Model for high-level reasoning with a trainable Diffusion Transformer for high-fidelity synthesis. To overcome the critical data scarcity in audio editing, we construct AudioEdit, a new large-scale dataset comprising over one million meticulously curated editing pairs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Audio-Omni achieves state-of-the-art performance across a suite of benchmarks, outperforming prior unified approaches while achieving performance on par with or superior to specialized expert models. Beyond its core capabilities, Audio-Omni exhibits remarkable inherited capabilities, including knowledge-augmented reasoning generation, in-context generation, and zero-shot cross-lingual control for audio generation, highlighting a promising direction toward universal generative audio intelligence. The code, model, and dataset will be publicly released on https://zeyuet.github.io/Audio-Omni.

analysis.tldr: 首个统一通用声音、音乐、语音生成与编辑的端到端框架，结合多模态大模型与扩散Transformer，并构建百万级音频编辑数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音频理解、生成和编辑能力通常由专用模型分别处理，缺乏真正统一的框架，且音频编辑领域数据严重稀缺。

contributions: 提出Audio-Omni，首个端到端统一通用声音、音乐、语音生成与编辑的框架。
构建AudioEdit，一个包含超过一百万精心策划编辑对的大规模音频编辑数据集。
在多个基准上达到最先进性能，超越先前统一方法，与专用专家模型性能相当或更优。

papers.title: Investigating Bias and Fairness in Appearance-based Gaze Estimation
papers.abstract: While appearance-based gaze estimation has achieved significant improvements in accuracy and domain adaptation, the fairness of these systems across different demographic groups remains largely unexplored. To date, there is no comprehensive benchmark quantifying algorithmic bias in gaze estimation. This paper presents the first extensive evaluation of fairness in appearance-based gaze estimation, focusing on ethnicity and gender attributes. We establish a fairness baseline by analyzing state-of-the-art models using standard fairness metrics, revealing significant performance disparities. Furthermore, we evaluate the effectiveness of existing bias mitigation strategies when applied to the gaze domain and show that their fairness contributions are limited. We summarize key insights and open issues. Overall, our work calls for research into developing robust, equitable gaze estimators. To support future research and reproducibility, we publicly release our annotations, code, and trained models at: github.com/akgulburak/gaze-estimation-fairness

analysis.tldr: 首次系统评估外观眼动追踪中的公平性，发现显著的人口统计偏差，现有缓解策略效果有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 外观眼动追踪在准确性和域适应方面取得显著进展，但系统在不同人口统计群体间的公平性尚未被探索，缺乏量化算法偏差的基准。
analysis.problem: 量化外观眼动追踪中基于种族和性别的算法偏差，并评估现有偏差缓解策略的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示最先进模型在公平性指标上存在显著性能差异，且现有偏差缓解策略在眼动领域贡献有限。
analysis.method: 建立公平性基线，使用标准公平性指标分析最先进模型，并评估现有偏差缓解策略在眼动领域的适用性。
contributions: 首次对外观眼动追踪进行全面的公平性评估，聚焦种族和性别属性。
公开了注释、代码和训练模型以支持可重复性研究。

limitations: 仅评估了种族和性别属性，其他人口统计属性（如年龄）未涉及。

papers.title: Architecture-Agnostic Modality-Isolated Gated Fusion for Robust Multi-Modal Prostate MRI Segmentation
papers.abstract: Multi-parametric prostate MRI combines T2-weighted (T2W), apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC), and high b-value diffusion-weighted (HBV) sequences for non-invasive detection of clinically significant prostate cancer. In practice, the diffusion sequences are more frequently subject to acquisition variability, motion, and artifacts than T2W, making robust fusion of these channels the clinically relevant requirement. We propose Modality-Isolated Gated Fusion (MIGF), an architecture-agnostic module that maintains separate modality-specific encoding streams before a learned gating stage, combined with modality dropout training to enforce compensation under incomplete inputs. We benchmark six backbones and assess MIGF-equipped models under seven missing-modality and artifact scenarios on PI-CAI (1,500 studies, fold-0 split, five seeds). MIGF improved ideal-scenario Ranking Score for UNet, nnUNet, and Mamba by 2.8%, 4.6%, and 13.4%; the best model (MIGFNet-nnUNet, gating + ModDrop, no deep supervision) achieved 0.7304 +/- 0.056. MIGF primarily improved tolerance to HBV/ADC degradation, while missing T2W remained a shared failure mode across all architectures. Mechanistic analysis shows that robustness gains arise from strict modality isolation and dropout-driven compensation rather than adaptive per-sample quality routing: the gate converged to a stable modality prior, and deep supervision was beneficial only for the largest backbone. External evaluation on Prostate158 (n=158) revealed substantial domain shift driven primarily by ADC map incompatibility across institutions; modality-isolation analysis confirmed that removing ADC improved external performance, identifying computed diffusion maps as inherently less portable than raw-acquired sequences.

analysis.tldr: 提出架构无关的模态隔离门控融合模块，通过模态隔离编码和模态丢弃训练提升多参数前列腺MRI分割的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多参数前列腺MRI中扩散序列比T2W更容易受到采集变异、运动和伪影影响，现有融合方法对缺失模态和伪影的鲁棒性不足，临床需要更鲁棒的融合策略。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种架构无关的融合模块，使得多模态MRI分割模型在缺失模态或伪影场景下仍能保持高性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Modality-Isolated Gated Fusion (MIGF)模块，包含模态隔离编码流、可学习门控阶段和模态丢弃训练，可插入任意骨干网络。
contributions: 提出架构无关的MIGF模块，通过模态隔离和门控实现鲁棒融合
在PI-CAI数据集上对六种骨干网络进行系统评估，显示MIGF在理想和缺失模态场景下均有提升
揭示门控收敛到稳定模态先验，鲁棒性提升主要来自模态隔离和丢弃训练而非自适应质量路由
外部验证发现ADC图跨机构域迁移问题，模态隔离分析表明移除ADC可提升外部性能
analysis.experiments: 在PI-CAI数据集（1500例，fold-0，5个种子）上评估六种骨干网络，涵盖七种缺失模态和伪影场景；外部验证在Prostate158（158例）上进行。
limitations: 缺失T2W是所有架构的共同失败模式，MIGF未能解决
外部验证中ADC图跨机构不兼容问题突出，MIGF未完全克服域迁移

papers.title: Bringing Value Models Back: Generative Critics for Value Modeling in LLM Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Credit assignment is a central challenge in reinforcement learning (RL). Classical actor-critic methods address this challenge through fine-grained advantage estimation based on a learned value function. However, learned value models are often avoided in modern large language model (LLM) RL because conventional discriminative critics are difficult to train reliably. We revisit value modeling and argue that this difficulty is partly due to limited expressiveness. In particular, representation complexity theory suggests that value functions can be hard to approximate under the one-shot prediction paradigm used by existing value models, and our scaling experiments show that such critics do not improve reliably with scale. Motivated by this observation, we propose Generative Actor-Critic (GenAC), which replaces one-shot scalar value prediction with a generative critic that performs chain-of-thought reasoning before producing a value estimate. We further introduce In-Context Conditioning, which helps the critic remain calibrated to the current actor throughout training. GenAC improves value approximation, ranking reliability, and out-of-distribution generalization, and these gains translate into stronger downstream RL performance than both value-based and value-free baselines. Overall, our results suggest that stronger value modeling is a promising direction for improving credit assignment in LLM reinforcement learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式评论家GenAC，通过链式思维推理替代单次标量预测，提升LLM强化学习中的价值建模与信用分配。
analysis.research_motivation: 信用分配是强化学习的核心挑战，但现代LLM强化学习中常避免使用学习价值模型，因为传统判别式评论家难以可靠训练。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM强化学习中的价值模型因表达力有限（单次预测范式）而难以可靠近似价值函数，且不随规模扩展而改善。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 表示复杂性理论表明价值函数在单次预测范式下难以近似，且缩放实验显示此类评论家不随规模可靠提升。
analysis.method: 提出生成式演员-评论家（GenAC），用生成式评论家替代单次标量预测，先进行链式思维推理再产生价值估计，并引入上下文条件化以保持评论家对当前演员的校准。
contributions: 揭示现有LLM价值模型因单次预测范式表达力不足而难以训练的问题
提出GenAC框架，利用生成式评论家进行链式思维推理以改进价值近似
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及GenAC在价值近似、排序可靠性和分布外泛化上优于基线，并转化为更强的下游RL性能。
limitations: 可能增加推理计算开销
链式思维推理的可靠性可能依赖于模型能力
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对LLM RL中价值模型难题提出生成式评论家，实验显示显著提升，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成式评论家GenAC，通过链式思维推理替代单次标量预测，提升LLM强化学习中的价值建模与信用分配。

papers.title: Camyla: Scaling Autonomous Research in Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: We present Camyla, a system for fully autonomous research within the scientific domain of medical image segmentation. Camyla transforms raw datasets into literature-grounded research proposals, executable experiments, and complete manuscripts without human intervention. Autonomous experimentation over long horizons poses three interrelated challenges: search effort drifts toward unpromising directions, knowledge from earlier trials degrades as context accumulates, and recovery from failures collapses into repetitive incremental fixes. To address these challenges, the system combines three coupled mechanisms: Quality-Weighted Branch Exploration for allocating effort across competing proposals, Layered Reflective Memory for retaining and compressing cross-trial knowledge at multiple granularities, and Divergent Diagnostic Feedback for diversifying recovery after underperforming trials. The system is evaluated on CamylaBench, a contamination-free benchmark of 31 datasets constructed exclusively from 2025 publications, under a strict zero-intervention protocol across two independent runs within a total of 28 days on an 8-GPU cluster. Across the two runs, Camyla generates more than 2,700 novel model implementations and 40 complete manuscripts, and surpasses the strongest per-dataset baseline selected from 14 established architectures, including nnU-Net, on 22 and 18 of 31 datasets under identical training budgets, respectively (union: 24/31). Senior human reviewers score the generated manuscripts at the T1/T2 boundary of contemporary medical imaging journals. Relative to automated baselines, Camyla outperforms AutoML and NAS systems on aggregate segmentation performance and exceeds six open-ended research agents on both task completion and baseline-surpassing frequency. These results suggest that domain-scale autonomous research is achievable in medical image segmentation.

analysis.tldr: Camyla 实现了医学图像分割领域的全自动科研，在 31 个数据集上超越 nnU-Net 等强基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割研究依赖大量人工试错，自动化科研系统面临搜索方向漂移、知识退化、失败恢复低效三大挑战，亟需能自主完成长周期实验的智能体。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个无需人类干预、能在医学图像分割领域自主完成从数据到论文全流程的科研系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出自主实验面临三个问题：搜索努力漂向无前途方向、早期试验知识随上下文累积而退化、失败恢复陷入重复增量修复。
analysis.method: 提出 Camyla 系统，包含三个耦合机制：质量加权分支探索（分配计算资源）、分层反射记忆（多粒度压缩跨试验知识）、发散诊断反馈（多样化失败恢复）。
contributions: 提出首个全自动科研系统 Camyla，覆盖从数据到论文的完整流程。
设计三个机制解决长周期自主实验中的搜索漂移、知识退化与失败恢复问题。
构建无污染基准 CamylaBench（31 个 2025 年数据集），并在严格零干预协议下验证系统有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 CamylaBench 上，两次独立运行共生成 2700+ 模型实现和 40 篇完整手稿，在 22/31 和 18/31 数据集上超越最强单数据集基线（含 nnU-Net），联合 24/31；手稿质量达 T1/T2 期刊边界；优于 AutoML、NAS 及六个开放科研智能体。
limitations: 仅针对医学图像分割领域，泛化性未知。
计算资源需求高（8-GPU 集群运行 28 天）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 全自动科研系统创新性强，实验充分且结果显著，与医学图像方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Camyla 实现了医学图像分割领域的全自动科研，在 31 个数据集上超越 nnU-Net 等强基线。

papers.title: Retrieving to Recover: Towards Incomplete Audio-Visual Question Answering via Semantic-consistent Purification
papers.abstract: Recent Audio-Visual Question Answering (AVQA) methods have advanced significantly. However, most AVQA methods lack effective mechanisms for handling missing modalities, suffering from severe performance degradation in real-world scenarios with data interruptions. Furthermore, prevailing methods for handling missing modalities predominantly rely on generative imputation to synthesize missing features. While partially effective, these methods tend to capture inter-modal commonalities but struggle to acquire unique, modality-specific knowledge within the missing data, leading to hallucinations and compromised reasoning accuracy. To tackle these challenges, we propose R$^{2}$ScP, a novel framework that shifts the paradigm of missing modality handling from traditional generative imputation to retrieval-based recovery. Specifically, we leverage cross-modal retrieval via unified semantic embeddings to acquire missing domain-specific knowledge. To maximize semantic restoration, we introduce a context-aware adaptive purification mechanism that eliminates latent semantic noise within the retrieved data. Additionally, we employ a two-stage training strategy to explicitly model the semantic relationships between knowledge from different sources. Extensive experiments demonstrate that R$^{2}$ScP significantly improves AVQA and enhances robustness in modal-incomplete scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出检索式恢复框架R²ScP，通过跨模态检索和语义净化解决不完整音视频问答中的模态缺失问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AVQA方法缺乏处理缺失模态的有效机制，在数据中断的真实场景中性能严重下降；而基于生成式插补的方法难以获取缺失模态的独特知识，导致幻觉和推理精度下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在不完整音视频问答中有效恢复缺失模态的领域特定知识，避免生成式方法的幻觉问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成式插补方法倾向于捕获模态间共性，但难以获取缺失模态的独特知识，导致幻觉和推理精度下降。
analysis.method: 提出R²ScP框架，通过统一语义嵌入进行跨模态检索获取缺失知识，引入上下文感知自适应净化机制消除检索数据中的语义噪声，并采用两阶段训练策略显式建模不同来源知识间的语义关系。
contributions: 提出从生成式插补到检索式恢复的范式转变，用于处理缺失模态问题
设计上下文感知自适应净化机制以最大化语义恢复
采用两阶段训练策略显式建模跨源语义关系
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 检索依赖外部知识库或预训练嵌入的质量
净化机制可能过度过滤有用信息
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（检索式恢复替代生成式），但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评分保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出检索式恢复框架R²ScP，通过跨模态检索和语义净化解决不完整音视频问答中的模态缺失问题。

papers.title: FACT-E: Causality-Inspired Evaluation for Trustworthy Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
papers.abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has improved LLM reasoning, but models often generate explanations that appear coherent while containing unfaithful intermediate steps. Existing self-evaluation approaches are prone to inherent biases: the model may confidently endorse coherence even when the step-to-step implication is not valid, leading to unreliable faithfulness evaluation. We propose FACT-E, a causality-inspired framework for evaluating CoT quality. FACT-E uses controlled perturbations as an instrumental signal to separate genuine step-to-step dependence from bias-driven artifacts, producing more reliable faithfulness estimates (\textit{intra-chain faithfulness}). To select trustworthy trajectories, FACT-E jointly considers \textit{intra-chain faithfulness} and \textit{CoT-to-answer consistency}, ensuring that selected chains are both faithful internally and supportive of the correct final answer. Experiments on GSM8K, MATH, and CommonsenseQA show that FACT-E improves reasoning-trajectory selection and yields stronger in-context learning exemplars. FACT-E also reliably detects flawed reasoning under noisy conditions, providing a robust metric for trustworthy LLM reasoning.

analysis.tldr: FACT-E 通过因果启发的扰动方法评估思维链的忠实性，提升推理轨迹选择质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有思维链推理中，模型常生成表面连贯但中间步骤不忠实的解释，而自评估方法易受模型固有偏见影响，无法可靠评估忠实性。
analysis.problem: 如何可靠地评估思维链推理中步骤间的忠实性，并选择既内部忠实又支持正确答案的推理轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在自评估时倾向于认可连贯性，即使步骤间蕴含关系无效，导致忠实性评估不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出因果启发的 FACT-E 框架，通过受控扰动作为工具变量分离真实步骤依赖与偏见伪影，联合考虑链内忠实性与链到答案一致性。
contributions: 提出因果启发的忠实性评估方法 FACT-E，利用受控扰动提供更可靠的链内忠实性估计
联合考虑链内忠实性与链到答案一致性，提升推理轨迹选择质量
analysis.experiments: 在 GSM8K、MATH 和 CommonsenseQA 上实验，FACT-E 改进了推理轨迹选择，生成了更强的上下文学习示例，并在噪声条件下可靠检测有缺陷的推理。
limitations: 可能依赖扰动设计的质量
未讨论在更大规模模型上的泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对可信推理评估有重要价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FACT-E 通过因果启发的扰动方法评估思维链的忠实性，提升推理轨迹选择质量。

papers.title: Do LLMs Build Spatial World Models? Evidence from Grid-World Maze Tasks
papers.abstract: Foundation models have shown remarkable performance across diverse tasks, yet their ability to construct internal spatial world models for reasoning and planning remains unclear. We systematically evaluate the spatial understanding of large language models through maze tasks, a controlled testing context requiring multi-step planning and spatial abstraction. Across comprehensive experiments with Gemini-2.5-Flash, GPT-5-mini, Claude-Haiku-4.5, and DeepSeek-Chat, we uncover significant discrepancies in spatial reasoning that challenge assumptions about LLM planning capabilities. Using chain-of-thought prompting, Gemini achieves 80-86% accuracy on smaller mazes (5x5 to 7x7 grids) with tokenized adjacency representations, but performance collapses to 16-34% with visual grid formats, which is a 2-5x difference, suggesting representation-dependent rather than format-invariant spatial reasoning. We further probe spatial understanding through sequential proximity questions and compositional distance comparisons. Despite achieving 96-99% semantic coverage in reasoning traces, models fail to leverage this understanding for consistent spatial computations, indicating that they treat each question independently rather than building cumulative spatial knowledge. Our findings based on the maze-solving tasks suggest that LLMs do not develop robust spatial world models, but rather exhibit representation-specific and prompting-dependent reasoning that succeeds only under narrow conditions. These results have critical implications for deploying foundation models in applications requiring spatial abstraction.

analysis.tldr: LLMs在迷宫任务中表现出依赖表示格式而非鲁棒的空间世界模型，空间推理能力有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管基础模型在多种任务中表现优异，但其是否构建内部空间世界模型用于推理和规划仍不清楚，这对需要空间抽象的应用至关重要。
analysis.problem: 评估大型语言模型是否具备鲁棒的空间世界模型，通过迷宫任务测试其空间理解和多步规划能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在token化邻接表示下表现较好（80-86%），但在视觉网格格式下性能骤降（16-34%），差异达2-5倍，表明空间推理依赖表示格式而非格式不变；尽管推理轨迹语义覆盖率达96-99%，模型仍无法进行一致的空间计算，说明其将每个问题独立处理而非构建累积空间知识。
analysis.method: 使用迷宫任务（5x5至7x7网格）系统评估LLM的空间理解，采用链式思维提示，比较不同表示格式（token化邻接 vs 视觉网格）和问题类型（顺序邻近、组合距离比较）。
contributions: 揭示了LLM在空间推理中依赖表示格式而非鲁棒世界模型的现象
通过迷宫任务系统评估了多种前沿LLM的空间理解能力
analysis.experiments: 在Gemini-2.5-Flash、GPT-5-mini、Claude-Haiku-4.5和DeepSeek-Chat上进行了全面实验，包括不同迷宫大小和表示格式。
limitations: 仅基于迷宫任务，可能无法完全代表现实世界空间推理
未测试其他类型空间任务或更复杂环境
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 论文揭示了LLM空间推理的关键局限性，实验设计系统，对理解模型能力有重要启示，但仅基于迷宫任务。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLMs在迷宫任务中表现出依赖表示格式而非鲁棒的空间世界模型，空间推理能力有限。

papers.title: SCOPE: Signal-Calibrated On-Policy Distillation Enhancement with Dual-Path Adaptive Weighting
papers.abstract: On-policy reinforcement learning has become the dominant paradigm for reasoning alignment in large language models, yet its sparse, outcome-level rewards make token-level credit assignment notoriously difficult. On-Policy Distillation (OPD) alleviates this by introducing dense, token-level KL supervision from a teacher model, but typically applies this supervision uniformly across all rollouts, ignoring fundamental differences in signal quality. We propose Signal-Calibrated On-Policy Distillation Enhancement (SCOPE), a dual-path adaptive training framework that routes on-policy rollouts by correctness into two complementary supervision paths. For incorrect trajectories, SCOPE performs teacher-perplexity-weighted KL distillation to prioritize instances where the teacher demonstrates genuine corrective capability, while down-weighting unreliable guidance. For correct trajectories, it applies student-perplexity-weighted MLE to concentrate reinforcement on low-confidence samples at the capability boundary rather than over-reinforcing already mastered ones. Both paths employ a group-level normalization to adaptively calibrate weight distributions, accounting for the intrinsic difficulty variance across prompts. Extensive experiments on six reasoning benchmarks show that SCOPE achieves an average relative improvement of 11.42% in Avg@32 and 7.30% in Pass@32 over competitive baselines, demonstrating its consistent effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: SCOPE通过双路径自适应加权框架，根据轨迹正确性差异化分配监督信号，显著提升大语言模型推理对齐性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线强化学习在推理对齐中面临稀疏奖励导致的token级信用分配难题，现有在线策略蒸馏（OPD）方法对所有轨迹统一施加KL监督，忽略了信号质量的差异。
analysis.problem: 如何根据轨迹正确性自适应地调整监督信号的权重，以提升在线策略蒸馏在推理对齐中的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SCOPE框架，包含双路径自适应训练：对错误轨迹使用教师困惑度加权的KL蒸馏，对正确轨迹使用学生困惑度加权的MLE，并采用组级归一化自适应校准权重分布。
contributions: 提出SCOPE，一种双路径自适应加权框架，根据轨迹正确性差异化分配监督信号。
在六个推理基准上平均提升11.42%的Avg@32和7.30%的Pass@32，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在六个推理基准上进行了实验，与竞争基线相比，SCOPE在Avg@32和Pass@32上分别取得11.42%和7.30%的平均相对提升。
limitations: 可能依赖于教师模型的质量，当教师模型不可靠时加权策略可能失效。
组级归一化可能引入额外超参数，需要调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且提升显著，与LLM对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SCOPE通过双路径自适应加权框架，根据轨迹正确性差异化分配监督信号，显著提升大语言模型推理对齐性能。

papers.title: Critical-CoT: A Robust Defense Framework against Reasoning-Level Backdoor Attacks in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs), despite their impressive capabilities across domains, have been shown to be vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Prior backdoor strategies predominantly operate at the token level, where an injected trigger causes the model to generate a specific target word, choice, or class (depending on the task). Recent advances, however, exploit the long-form reasoning tendencies of modern LLMs to conduct reasoning-level backdoors: once triggered, the victim model inserts one or more malicious reasoning steps into its chain-of-thought (CoT). These attacks are substantially harder to detect, as the backdoored answer remains plausible and consistent with the poisoned reasoning trajectory. Yet, defenses tailored to this type of backdoor remain largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose Critical-CoT, a novel defense mechanism that conducts a two-stage fine-tuning (FT) process on LLMs to develop critical thinking behaviors, enabling them to automatically identify potential backdoors and refuse to generate malicious reasoning steps. Extensive experiments across multiple LLMs and datasets demonstrate that Critical-CoT provides strong robustness against both in-context learning-based and FT-based backdoor attacks. Notably, Critical-CoT exhibits strong cross-domain and cross-task generalization. Our code is available at hthttps://github.com/tuanvu171/Critical-CoT.

analysis.tldr: 提出Critical-CoT，通过两阶段微调让LLM学会批判性思维，自动识别并拒绝生成恶意推理步骤，防御推理层后门攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有后门防御主要针对token级攻击，而推理层后门攻击利用LLM的长推理倾向插入恶意步骤，更难检测，但缺乏针对性防御。
analysis.problem: 如何防御LLM中的推理层后门攻击，即攻击者通过触发使模型在思维链中插入恶意推理步骤。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推理层后门攻击生成的答案与恶意推理轨迹一致，难以被现有方法检测。
analysis.method: 两阶段微调：第一阶段让LLM学习识别后门触发并拒绝生成恶意步骤，第二阶段保持正常推理能力。
contributions: 提出Critical-CoT，首个针对推理层后门攻击的防御框架。
通过两阶段微调使LLM发展批判性思维，自动识别并拒绝恶意推理步骤。
实验证明在多种LLM和数据集上对基于上下文学习和微调的后门攻击具有强鲁棒性，且跨领域跨任务泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM和数据集上进行实验，验证了Critical-CoT对基于上下文学习和微调的后门攻击的鲁棒性，并展示了跨领域和跨任务泛化能力。
limitations: 可能对正常推理性能有轻微影响。
防御效果依赖于微调数据的质量和多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对新兴推理层后门攻击提出首个防御框架，方法新颖且实验充分，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Critical-CoT，通过两阶段微调让LLM学会批判性思维，自动识别并拒绝生成恶意推理步骤，防御推理层后门攻击。

papers.title: FedRio: Personalized Federated Social Bot Detection via Cooperative Reinforced Contrastive Adversarial Distillation
papers.abstract: Social bot detection is critical to the stability and security of online social platforms. However, current state-of-the-art bot detection models are largely developed in isolation, overlooking the benefits of leveraging shared detection patterns across platforms to improve performance and promptly identify emerging bot variants. The heterogeneity of data distributions and model architectures further complicates the design of an effective cross-platform and cross-model detection framework. To address these challenges, we propose FedRio (Personalized Federated Social Bot Detection with Cooperative Reinforced Contrastive Adversarial Distillation framework. We first introduce an adaptive message-passing module as the graph neural network backbone for each client. To facilitate efficient knowledge sharing of global data distributions, we design a federated knowledge extraction mechanism based on generative adversarial networks. Additionally, we employ a multi-stage adversarial contrastive learning strategy to enforce feature space consistency among clients and reduce divergence between local and global models. Finally, we adopt adaptive server-side parameter aggregation and reinforcement learning-based client-side parameter control to better accommodate data heterogeneity in heterogeneous federated settings. Extensive experiments on two real-world social bot detection benchmarks demonstrate that FedRio consistently outperforms state-of-the-art federated learning baselines in detection accuracy, communication efficiency, and feature space consistency, while remaining competitive with published centralized results under substantially stronger privacy constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出FedRio框架，通过联邦学习、对抗生成网络和强化学习实现跨平台社交机器人检测，在隐私约束下达到接近集中式方法的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有社交机器人检测模型孤立开发，未能利用跨平台共享检测模式提升性能并快速识别新型机器人变种，且数据分布和模型架构的异构性增加了跨平台检测框架的设计难度。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护隐私的前提下，实现跨平台、跨模型的社交机器人检测，并处理数据异构性和模型架构差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FedRio框架，包括：1) 自适应消息传递模块作为图神经网络骨干；2) 基于生成对抗网络的联邦知识提取机制；3) 多阶段对抗对比学习策略；4) 自适应服务器端参数聚合和基于强化学习的客户端参数控制。
contributions: 提出FedRio框架，结合联邦学习、对抗生成网络和强化学习解决跨平台社交机器人检测问题。
设计多阶段对抗对比学习策略增强特征空间一致性，并采用自适应聚合和强化学习参数控制处理数据异构性。
analysis.experiments: 在两个真实社交机器人检测基准上，FedRio在检测准确率、通信效率和特征空间一致性上持续优于最先进的联邦学习基线，并在更强隐私约束下与已发表的集中式结果竞争。
limitations: 可能依赖特定图神经网络架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
强化学习参数控制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，结合多种技术解决实际问题，实验充分，但属于特定应用方向，与核心关注点中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FedRio框架，通过联邦学习、对抗生成网络和强化学习实现跨平台社交机器人检测，在隐私约束下达到接近集中式方法的性能。

papers.title: LIDEA: Human-to-Robot Imitation Learning via Implicit Feature Distillation and Explicit Geometry Alignment
papers.abstract: Scaling up robot learning is hindered by the scarcity of robotic demonstrations, whereas human videos offer a vast, untapped source of interaction data. However, bridging the embodiment gap between human hands and robot arms remains a critical challenge. Existing cross-embodiment transfer strategies typically rely on visual editing, but they often introduce visual artifacts due to intrinsic discrepancies in visual appearance and 3D geometry. To address these limitations, we introduce LIDEA (Implicit Feature Distillation and Explicit Geometric Alignment), an imitation learning framework in which policy learning benefits from human demonstrations. In the 2D visual domain, LIDEA employs a dual-stage transitive distillation pipeline that aligns human and robot representations in a shared latent space. In the 3D geometric domain, we propose an embodiment-agnostic alignment strategy that explicitly decouples embodiment from interaction geometry, ensuring consistent 3D-aware perception. Extensive experiments empirically validate LIDEA from two perspectives: data efficiency and OOD robustness. Results show that human data substitutes up to 80% of costly robot demonstrations, and the framework successfully transfers unseen patterns from human videos for out-of-distribution generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出LIDEA框架，通过隐式特征蒸馏和显式几何对齐，利用人类视频数据提升机器人模仿学习的数据效率和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人学习受限于昂贵的机器人演示数据稀缺，而人类视频数据丰富但存在形态差异（人手与机械臂），现有跨形态迁移方法常因视觉外观和3D几何差异引入伪影。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用人类视频数据，克服跨形态（人手到机械臂）的视觉和几何差异，提升机器人模仿学习的数据效率和分布外泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LIDEA框架包含两部分：2D视觉域采用双阶段传递蒸馏对齐人机表征到共享隐空间；3D几何域提出形态无关对齐策略，显式解耦形态与交互几何，实现一致的3D感知。
contributions: 提出LIDEA框架，结合隐式特征蒸馏和显式几何对齐，实现从人类视频到机器人策略的有效迁移。
实验证明人类数据可替代高达80%的昂贵机器人演示，并提升分布外泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在机器人模仿学习任务上验证数据效率和分布外鲁棒性，人类数据替代80%机器人演示，并成功泛化到未见模式。
limitations: 可能依赖特定形态的机器人硬件，泛化到其他形态需验证。
双阶段蒸馏和几何对齐的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验显示显著数据效率提升，与机器人模仿学习方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LIDEA框架，通过隐式特征蒸馏和显式几何对齐，利用人类视频数据提升机器人模仿学习的数据效率和泛化能力。

papers.title: HiddenObjects: Scalable Diffusion-Distilled Spatial Priors for Object Placement
papers.abstract: We propose a method to learn explicit, class-conditioned spatial priors for object placement in natural scenes by distilling the implicit placement knowledge encoded in text-conditioned diffusion models. Prior work relies either on manually annotated data, which is inherently limited in scale, or on inpainting-based object-removal pipelines, whose artifacts promote shortcut learning. To address these limitations, we introduce a fully automated and scalable framework that evaluates dense object placements on high-quality real backgrounds using a diffusion-based inpainting pipeline. With this pipeline, we construct HiddenObjects, a large-scale dataset comprising 27M placement annotations, evaluated across 27k distinct scenes, with ranked bounding box insertions for different images and object categories. Experimental results show that our spatial priors outperform sparse human annotations on a downstream image editing task (3.90 vs. 2.68 VLM-Judge), and significantly surpass existing placement baselines and zero-shot Vision-Language Models for object placement. Furthermore, we distill these priors into a lightweight model for fast practical inference (230,000x faster).

analysis.tldr: 通过扩散模型蒸馏大规模空间先验，实现高效物体放置。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有物体放置方法依赖人工标注（规模有限）或基于修复的物体移除流程（伪影导致捷径学习），亟需自动化、可扩展的框架。
analysis.problem: 如何从扩散模型中蒸馏出显式、类别条件的空间先验，用于自然场景中的物体放置。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出全自动可扩展框架，利用扩散修复管道评估密集物体放置，构建包含2700万标注的大规模数据集HiddenObjects，并蒸馏空间先验至轻量模型。
contributions: 提出自动化框架，通过扩散修复管道生成大规模、高质量的物体放置标注。
构建HiddenObjects数据集（27M标注，27k场景），并蒸馏出显式空间先验。
实验表明先验在下游任务中优于人工标注和现有基线，且轻量模型推理速度提升23万倍。
analysis.experiments: 在图像编辑任务中，空间先验VLM-Judge得分3.90 vs 人工标注2.68；显著超越现有放置基线和零样本VLM。
limitations: 可能依赖扩散模型的质量和多样性。
轻量模型可能损失部分先验精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，数据集规模大，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过扩散模型蒸馏大规模空间先验，实现高效物体放置。

papers.title: Skill-SD: Skill-Conditioned Self-Distillation for Multi-turn LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has been widely used to train LLM agents for multi-turn interactive tasks, but its sample efficiency is severely limited by sparse rewards and long horizons. On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) alleviates this by providing dense token-level supervision from a privileged teacher that has access to ground-truth answers. However, such fixed privileged information cannot capture the diverse valid strategies in agent tasks, and naively combining OPSD with RL often leads to training collapse. To address these limitations, we introduce Skill-SD, a framework that turns the agent's own trajectories into dynamic training-only supervision. Completed trajectories are summarized into compact natural language skills that describe successful behaviors, mistakes, and workflows. These skills serve as dynamic privileged information conditioning only the teacher, while the student always acts under the plain task prompt and learns to internalize the guidance through distillation. To stabilize the training, we derive an importance-weighted reverse-KL loss to provide gradient-correct token-level distillation, and dynamically synchronize the teacher with the improving student. Experimental results on agentic benchmarks demonstrate that Skill-SD substantially outperforms the standard RL baseline, improving both vanilla GRPO (+14.0%/+10.9% on AppWorld/Sokoban) and vanilla OPD (+42.1%/+40.6%). Project page: https://k1xe.github.io/skill-sd/

analysis.tldr: Skill-SD通过技能条件自蒸馏，将智能体自身轨迹转化为动态监督信号，显著提升多轮LLM智能体的样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习训练多轮LLM智能体面临稀疏奖励和长视界导致的样本效率低下问题，现有在线策略自蒸馏方法使用固定的特权信息无法捕捉多样化的有效策略，且与RL简单结合会导致训练崩溃。
analysis.problem: 如何利用智能体自身轨迹生成动态、多样化的监督信号，并稳定地结合强化学习与自蒸馏来提升多轮LLM智能体的训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出固定特权信息无法覆盖智能体任务中的多样有效策略，且朴素结合OPSD与RL会导致训练崩溃。
analysis.method: Skill-SD框架：将智能体完成轨迹总结为紧凑的自然语言技能（描述成功行为、错误和工作流），作为动态特权信息仅用于教师模型；学生模型在普通任务提示下行动，通过蒸馏内化指导；使用重要性加权反向KL损失进行梯度校正的token级蒸馏，并动态同步教师与学生。
contributions: 提出Skill-SD框架，利用智能体自身轨迹生成动态技能作为特权信息，提升监督多样性。
设计重要性加权反向KL损失和动态同步机制，稳定训练并避免崩溃。
在AppWorld和Sokoban基准上显著优于标准RL基线（GRPO和OPD）。
analysis.experiments: 在AppWorld和Sokoban两个智能体基准上评估，Skill-SD相比标准RL基线（GRPO和OPD）分别提升14.0%/10.9%和42.1%/40.6%。
limitations: 技能总结的质量可能依赖于轨迹长度和任务复杂度。
方法在更广泛的多轮交互任务上的泛化性尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验提升显著，且与LLM Agent方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Skill-SD通过技能条件自蒸馏，将智能体自身轨迹转化为动态监督信号，显著提升多轮LLM智能体的样本效率。

papers.title: Principles Do Not Apply Themselves: A Hermeneutic Perspective on AI Alignment
papers.abstract: AI alignment is often framed as the task of ensuring that an AI system follows a set of stated principles or human preferences, but general principles rarely determine their own application in concrete cases. When principles conflict, when they are too broad to settle a situation, or when the relevant facts are unclear, an additional act of judgment is required. This paper analyzes that step through the lens of hermeneutics and argues that alignment therefore includes an interpretive component: it involves context-sensitive judgments about how principles should be read, applied, and prioritized in practice. We connect this claim to recent empirical findings showing that a substantial portion of preference-labeling data falls into cases of principle conflict or indifference, where the principle set does not uniquely determine a decision. We then draw an operational consequence: because such judgments are expressed in behavior, many alignment-relevant choices appear only in the distribution of responses a model generates at deployment time. To formalize this point, we distinguish deployment-induced and corpus-induced evaluation and show that off-policy audits can fail to capture alignment-relevant failures when the two response distributions differ. We argue that principle-specified alignment includes a context-dependent interpretive component.

analysis.tldr: 从诠释学视角论证AI对齐包含上下文敏感的解读成分，并指出离策略审计可能遗漏对齐相关失败。
analysis.research_motivation: AI对齐通常被简化为让系统遵循固定原则，但原则在具体情境中常存在冲突、模糊或事实不清，需要额外的判断步骤，现有方法忽视了这一解读性成分。

papers.title: Learning and Enforcing Context-Sensitive Control for LLMs
papers.abstract: Controlling the output of Large Language Models (LLMs) through context-sensitive constraints has emerged as a promising approach to overcome the limitations of Context-Free Grammars (CFGs) in guaranteeing generation validity. However, such constraints typically require manual specification -- a significant barrier demanding specialized expertise. We introduce a framework that automatically learns context-sensitive constraints from LLM interactions through a two-phase process: syntactic exploration to gather diverse outputs for constraint learning, followed by constraint exploitation to enforce these learned rules during generation. Experiments demonstrate that our method enables even small LLMs (1B parameters) to learn and generate with perfect constraint adherence, outperforming larger counterparts and state-of-the-art reasoning models. This work represents the first integration of context-sensitive grammar learning with LLM generation, eliminating manual specification while maintaining generation validity.

analysis.tldr: 提出自动学习并强制执行上下文敏感约束的框架，使小模型也能完美遵守生成规则。

papers.title: Omnimodal Dataset Distillation via High-order Proxy Alignment
papers.abstract: Dataset distillation compresses large-scale datasets into compact synthetic sets while preserving training performance, but existing methods are largely restricted to single-modal or bimodal settings. Extending dataset distillation to scenarios involving more than two modalities, i.e., Omnimodal Dataset Distillation, remains underexplored and challenging due to increased heterogeneity and complex cross-modal interactions. In this work, we identify the key determinant that bounds the endpoint discrepancy in the omnimodal setting, which is exacerbated with an increasing number of modalities. To this end, we propose HoPA, a unified method that captures high-order cross-modal alignments via a compact proxy, which is compatible with trajectory matching as well. By abstracting omnimodal alignment with a shared similarity structure, our method avoids the combinatorial complexity of pairwise modality modeling and enables scalable joint distillation across heterogeneous modalities. Theoretical analysis from the spectral perspective reveals the rationality of our proposed method against bimodal dataset distillation techniques. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior compression-performance trade-offs compared to existing competitors. The source code will be publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出高阶代理对齐方法，首次实现多模态（超过两种模态）数据集蒸馏。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据集蒸馏方法局限于单模态或双模态，无法处理超过两种模态的异构数据，且多模态场景下异质性和跨模态交互复杂，导致端点差异增大。
analysis.problem: 如何高效实现多模态（Omnimodal）数据集蒸馏，避免成对模态建模的组合复杂度，并缓解多模态带来的端点差异。

analysis.method: 提出HoPA方法，通过紧凑代理（proxy）捕获高阶跨模态对齐，并兼容轨迹匹配，利用共享相似性结构抽象多模态对齐，避免成对建模。

analysis.experiments: 在多种基准上进行了广泛实验，表明HoPA在压缩-性能权衡上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖代理质量，代理设计不当会影响对齐效果。

papers.title: DBGL: Decay-aware Bipartite Graph Learning for Irregular Medical Time Series Classification
papers.abstract: Irregular Medical Time Series play a critical role in the clinical domain to better understand the patient's condition. However, inherent irregularity arising from heterogeneous sampling rates, asynchronous observations, and variable gaps poses key challenges for reliable modeling. Existing methods often distort temporal sampling irregularity and missingness patterns while failing to capture variable decay irregularity, resulting in suboptimal representations. To address these limitations, we introduce DBGL, Decay-Aware Bipartite Graph Learning for Irregular Medical Time Series. DBGL first introduces a patient-variable bipartite graph that simultaneously captures irregular sampling patterns without artificial alignment and adaptively models variable relationships for temporal sampling irregularity modeling, enhancing representation learning. To model variable decay irregularity, DBGL designs a novel node-specific temporal decay encoding mechanism that captures each variable's decay rates based on sampling interval, yielding a more accurate and faithful representation of irregular temporal dynamics. We evaluate the performance of DBGL on four publicly available datasets, and the results show that DBGL outperforms all baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出DBGL，通过二分图学习和节点特定时间衰减编码，提升不规则医疗时间序列分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 不规则医疗时间序列在临床中至关重要，但现有方法难以处理异质采样率、异步观测和可变间隔带来的不规则性，导致表征次优。

papers.title: Preference-Agile Multi-Objective Optimization for Real-time Vehicle Dispatching
papers.abstract: Multi-objective optimization (MOO) has been widely studied in literature because of its versatility in human-centered decision making in real-life applications. Recently, demand for dynamic MOO is fast-emerging due to tough market dynamics that require real-time re-adjustments of priorities for different objectives. However, most existing studies focus either on deterministic MOO problems which are not practical, or non-sequential dynamic MOO decision problems that cannot deal with some real-life complexities. To address these challenges, a preference-agile multi-objective optimization (PAMOO) is proposed in this paper to permit users to dynamically adjust and interactively assign the preferences on the fly. To achieve this, a novel uniform model within a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework is proposed that can take as inputs users' dynamic preference vectors explicitly. Additionally, a calibration function is fitted to ensure high quality alignment between the preference vector inputs and the output DRL decision policy. Extensive experiments on challenging real-life vehicle dispatching problems at a container terminal showed that PAMOO obtains superior performance and generalization ability when compared with two most popular MOO methods. Our method presents the first dynamic MOO method for challenging \rev{dynamic sequential MOO decision problems

papers.title: Polynomial Expansion Rank Adaptation: Enhancing Low-Rank Fine-Tuning with High-Order Interactions
papers.abstract: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) is a widely used strategy for efficient fine-tuning of large language models (LLMs), but its strictly linear structure fundamentally limits expressive capacity. The bilinear formulation of weight updates captures only first-order dependencies between low-rank factors, restricting the modeling of nonlinear and higher-order parameter interactions. In this paper, we propose Polynomial Expansion Rank Adaptation (PERA), a novel method that introduces structured polynomial expansion directly into the low-rank factor space. By expanding each low-rank factor to synthesize high-order interaction terms before composition, PERA transforms the adaptation space into a polynomial manifold capable of modeling richer nonlinear coupling without increasing rank or inference cost. We provide theoretical analysis demonstrating that PERA offers enhanced expressive capacity and more effective feature utilization compare to existing linear adaptation approaches. Empirically, PERA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across diverse benchmarks. Notably, our experiments show that incorporating high-order nonlinear components particularly square terms is crucial for enhancing expressive capacity and maintaining strong and robust performance under various rank settings. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhangwenhao6/PERA

analysis.tldr: PERA通过多项式展开低秩因子空间，在不增加推理成本下提升LoRA的表达能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LoRA的线性结构限制了其对高阶非线性参数交互的建模能力，亟需一种能引入非线性耦合的低秩微调方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加秩和推理成本的前提下，增强低秩微调对高阶非线性参数交互的表达能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LoRA的严格线性结构仅能捕获低秩因子间的一阶依赖，无法建模高阶非线性交互，且实验发现平方项等高阶非线性成分对提升表达能力至关重要。

contributions: 提出PERA方法，通过多项式展开增强低秩微调的表达能力，不增加推理成本。

papers.title: DynamicsLLM: a Dynamic Analysis-based Tool for Generating Intelligent Execution Traces Using LLMs to Detect Android Behavioural Code Smells
papers.abstract: Mobile apps have become essential of our daily lives, making code quality a critical concern for developers. Behavioural code smells are characteristics in the source code that induce inappropriate code behaviour during execution, which negatively impact software quality in terms of performance, energy consumption, and memory. Dynamics, the latest state-of-the-art tool-based method, is highly effective at detecting Android behavioural code smells. While it outperforms static analysis tools, it suffers from a high false negative rate, with multiple code smell instances remaining undetected. Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved notable advances across numerous research domains and offer significant potential for generating intelligent execution traces, particularly for detecting behavioural code smells in Android mobile applications. By intelligent execution trace, we mean a sequence of events generated by specific actions in a way that triggers the identification of a given behaviour. We propose the following three main contributions in this paper: (1) DynamicsLLM, an enhanced implementation of the Dynamics method that leverages LLMs to intelligently generate execution traces. (2) A novel hybrid approach designed to improve the coverage of code smell-related events in applications with a small number of activities. (3) A comprehensive validation of DynamicsLLM on 333 mobile applications from F-DROID, including a comparison with the Dynamics tool. Our results show that, under a limited number of actions, DynamicsLLM configured with 100% LLM covers three times more code smell-related events than Dynamics. The hybrid approach improves LLM coverage by 25.9% for apps containing few activities. Moreover, 12.7% of the code smell-related events that cannot be triggered by Dynamics are successfully triggered by our tool.

analysis.tldr: DynamicsLLM利用LLM智能生成执行轨迹，显著提升Android行为代码异味检测覆盖率。

papers.title: Efficient Process Reward Modeling via Contrastive Mutual Information
papers.abstract: Recent research has devoted considerable effort to verifying the intermediate reasoning steps of chain-of-thought (CoT) trajectories using process reward models (PRMs) and other verifier models. However, training a PRM typically requires human annotators to assign reward scores to each reasoning step, which is both costly and time-consuming. Existing automated approaches, such as Monte Carlo (MC) estimation, also demand substantial computational resources due to repeated LLM rollouts. To overcome these limitations, we propose contrastive pointwise mutual information (CPMI), a novel automatic reward labeling method that leverages the model's internal probability to infer step-level supervision while significantly reducing the computational burden of annotating dataset. CPMI quantifies how much a reasoning step increases the mutual information between the step and the correct target answer relative to hard-negative alternatives. This contrastive signal serves as a proxy for the step's contribution to the final solution and yields a reliable reward. The experimental results show that CPMI-based labeling reduces dataset construction time by 84% and token generation by 98% compared to MC estimation, while achieving higher accuracy on process-level evaluations and mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出对比点互信息（CPMI）方法，利用模型内部概率高效标注过程奖励，大幅降低计算成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 过程奖励模型（PRM）训练需要人工标注或蒙特卡洛（MC）估计，成本高且耗时，亟需高效的自动标注方法。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出对比点互信息（CPMI），通过计算推理步骤与正确答案之间的互信息相对于硬负样本的对比信号，作为步骤贡献的代理，实现自动奖励标注。

实验表明CPMI将数据集构建时间减少84%，token生成减少98%，并在过程级评估和数学推理基准上取得更高准确率。

papers.title: Governed Reasoning for Institutional AI
papers.abstract: Institutional decisions -- regulatory compliance, clinical triage, prior authorization appeal -- require a different AI architecture than general-purpose agents provide. Agent frameworks infer authority conversationally, reconstruct accountability from logs, and produce silent errors: incorrect determinations that execute without any human review signal. We propose Cognitive Core: a governed decision substrate built from nine typed cognitive primitives (retrieve, classify, investigate, verify, challenge, reflect, deliberate, govern, generate), a four-tier governance model where human review is a condition of execution rather than a post-hoc check, a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chain audit ledger endogenous to computation, and a demand-driven delegation architecture supporting both declared and autonomously reasoned epistemic sequences. We benchmark three systems on an 11-case balanced prior authorization appeal evaluation set. Cognitive Core achieves 91% accuracy against 55% (ReAct) and 45% (Plan-and-Solve). The governance result is more significant: CC produced zero silent errors while both baselines produced 5-6. We introduce governability -- how reliably a system knows when it should not act autonomously -- as a primary evaluation axis for institutional AI alongside accuracy. The baselines are implemented as prompts, representing the realistic deployment alternative to a governed framework. A configuration-driven domain model means deploying a new institutional decision domain requires YAML configuration, not engineering capacity.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种受治理的推理架构Cognitive Core，通过内置人类审查条件和防篡改审计日志，在机构决策中实现零静默错误，准确率91%远超ReAct和Plan-and-Solve。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI代理框架在机构决策（如监管合规、临床分诊）中会产生静默错误——错误判定自动执行而无人审查，缺乏治理机制，导致不可靠和不可审计。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种AI架构，使其在机构决策中既能保持高准确率，又能确保关键步骤必须经过人类审查，避免静默错误，并提供可审计的决策过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到基线方法（ReAct、Plan-and-Solve）在11例先验授权上诉评估中分别产生5-6个静默错误，而Cognitive Core为零；同时基线准确率仅55%和45%，远低于CC的91%。这表明现有代理框架缺乏治理能力，无法可靠地判断何时不应自主行动。
analysis.method: Cognitive Core：由九种类型化认知原语（检索、分类、调查、验证、挑战、反思、深思、治理、生成）组成；四层治理模型，人类审查作为执行条件而非事后检查；计算内生的防篡改SHA-256哈希链审计账本；需求驱动的委托架构，支持声明式和自主推理的认知序列。
contributions: 提出Cognitive Core架构，将人类审查嵌入执行条件，实现零静默错误。
引入“可治理性”作为机构AI的主要评估轴，与准确率并列。
在11例先验授权上诉评估集上，CC准确率91%，远超ReAct（55%）和Plan-and-Solve（45%）。
提供配置驱动的领域模型，新决策域仅需YAML配置，无需工程能力。
analysis.experiments: 在11例平衡的先验授权上诉评估集上，对比Cognitive Core与ReAct、Plan-and-Solve（均以提示方式实现）。CC准确率91%，ReAct 55%，Plan-and-Solve 45%；CC零静默错误，基线各5-6个。
limitations: 评估集规模较小（仅11例），可能不足以泛化到更广泛的机构决策场景。
基线以提示方式实现，可能未完全代表其潜力；与微调或专用模型的对比未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（治理架构、可治理性指标），实验显示显著优势，但评估规模小，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种受治理的推理架构Cognitive Core，通过内置人类审查条件和防篡改审计日志，在机构决策中实现零静默错误，准确率91%远超ReAct和Plan-and-Solve。

papers.title: LoViF 2026 The First Challenge on Weather Removal in Videos
papers.abstract: This paper presents a review of the LoViF 2026 Challenge on Weather Removal in Videos. The challenge encourages the development of methods for restoring clean videos from inputs degraded by adverse weather conditions such as rain and snow, with an emphasis on achieving visually plausible and temporally consistent results while preserving scene structure and motion dynamics. To support this task, we introduce a new short-form WRV dataset tailored for video weather removal. It consists of 18 videos 1,216 synthesized frames paired with 1,216 real-world ground-truth frames at a resolution of 832 x 480, and is split into training, validation, and test sets with a ratio of 1:1:1. The goal of this challenge is to advance robust and realistic video restoration under real-world weather conditions, with evaluation protocols that jointly consider fidelity and perceptual quality. The challenge attracted 37 participants and received 5 valid final submissions with corresponding fact sheets, contributing to progress in weather removal for videos. The project is publicly available at https://www.codabench.org/competitions/13462/.

analysis.tldr: LoViF 2026 挑战赛聚焦视频去雨雪，发布新数据集并评估时序一致性与视觉质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 恶劣天气（如雨雪）会严重降低视频质量，影响下游视觉任务；现有方法在时序一致性和场景结构保持上仍有不足，亟需标准化评测与数据集。
analysis.problem: 从雨雪退化的视频中恢复出视觉逼真、时序一致且保留运动动态的干净视频。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，发布包含18个视频、1216对合成-真实帧的WRV数据集，并制定联合考虑保真度和感知质量的评估协议。
contributions: 发布了首个面向视频天气去除的短格式WRV数据集（832×480分辨率，1:1:1划分训练/验证/测试）。
组织了LoViF 2026挑战赛，吸引37名参与者，收到5份有效提交，推动了视频天气去除领域进展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（仅18个视频），可能限制模型泛化性。
合成数据与真实世界天气退化之间可能存在域差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集规模较小但针对视频天气去除这一特定任务，适合作为基准参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LoViF 2026 挑战赛聚焦视频去雨雪，发布新数据集并评估时序一致性与视觉质量。

papers.title: Enhancing Cross-Problem Vehicle Routing via Federated Learning
papers.abstract: Vehicle routing problems (VRPs) constitute a core optimization challenge in modern logistics and supply chain management. The recent neural combinatorial optimization (NCO) has demonstrated superior efficiency over some traditional algorithms. While serving as a primary NCO approach for solving general VRPs, current cross-problem learning paradigms are still subject to performance degradation and generalizability decay, when transferring from simple VRP variants to those involving different and complex constraints. To strengthen the paradigms, this paper offers an innovative "Multi-problem Pre-train, then Single-problem Fine-tune" framework with Federated Learning (MPSF-FL). This framework exploits the common knowledge of a federated global model to foster efficient cross-problem knowledge sharing and transfer among local models for single-problem fine-tuning. In this way, local models effectively retain common VRP knowledge from up-to-date global model, while being efficiently adapted to downstream VRPs with heterogeneous complex constraints. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework not only enhances the performance in diverse VRPs, but also improves the generalizability in unseen problems.

analysis.tldr: 提出联邦学习框架MPSF-FL，通过多问题预训练和单问题微调提升车辆路径问题的跨问题泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 车辆路径问题（VRP）是物流与供应链管理的核心优化挑战，神经组合优化（NCO）虽高效，但现有跨问题学习范式在从简单VRP变体迁移到复杂约束变体时性能下降、泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何增强NCO模型在异构复杂约束VRP间的知识共享与迁移能力，克服性能退化与泛化性衰减。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前跨问题学习范式在从简单VRP变体迁移到涉及不同复杂约束的变体时，存在性能退化与泛化性衰减现象。
analysis.method: 提出MPSF-FL框架，采用“多问题预训练，单问题微调”策略，通过联邦学习维护一个全局模型，利用其共享知识促进各局部模型在单问题微调中的知识迁移，使局部模型既能保留全局通用VRP知识，又能高效适应下游异构复杂约束VRP。
contributions: 提出MPSF-FL框架，将联邦学习引入跨问题VRP求解，实现多问题预训练与单问题微调的高效知识共享。
实验证明该框架在多种VRP上提升性能，并在未见问题上改善泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖联邦学习通信开销，实际部署效率待验证。
仅提及VRP领域，未讨论其他组合优化问题的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但摘要实验细节不足，且属于优化领域非核心方向，建议保存后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出联邦学习框架MPSF-FL，通过多问题预训练和单问题微调提升车辆路径问题的跨问题泛化能力。

papers.title: Vibe-driven model-based engineering
papers.abstract: There is a pressing need for better development methods and tools to keep up with the growing demand and increasing complexity of new software systems. New types of user interfaces, the need for intelligent components, sustainability concerns, etc. bring new challenges that we need to handle. In the last years, model-driven engineering (MDE), including its latest incarnation, i.e. low/no-code development, has been key to improving the quality and productivity of software development, but models themselves are becoming increasingly complex to specify and manage. At the same time, we are witnessing the growing popularity of vibe coding approaches that rely on Large Language Models (LLMs) to transform natural language descriptions into running code at the expense of potential code vulnerabilities, scalability issues and maintainability concerns. While many may think vibe coding will replace model-based engineering, in this paper we argue that, in fact, the two approaches can complement each other and provide altogether different development paths for different types of software systems, development scenarios, and user profiles. In this sense, we introduce the concept of \textit{vibe-driven model-based engineering} as a novel approach to integrate the best of both worlds (AI and MDE) to accelerate the development of reliable complex systems. We outline the key concepts of this new approach and highlight the opportunities and open challenges it presents for the future of software development.

analysis.tldr: 提出“氛围驱动模型工程”概念，融合大语言模型与模型驱动工程以加速可靠复杂系统开发。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件系统日益复杂，现有模型驱动工程（MDE）在模型规范和管理上遇到瓶颈，而新兴的vibe coding方法虽能快速生成代码但存在漏洞、可扩展性和维护性问题，亟需一种融合两者优势的开发范式。
analysis.problem: 如何将大语言模型驱动的自然语言到代码生成（vibe coding）与模型驱动工程（MDE）有机结合，以兼顾开发效率与系统可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出vibe coding方法依赖LLM将自然语言描述转化为可运行代码，但存在代码漏洞、可扩展性差和维护困难等问题；而MDE虽能提升质量和生产力，但模型本身日益复杂。两者并非替代关系，而是可以互补。
analysis.method: 提出vibe-driven model-based engineering概念，整合AI（LLM）与MDE的优势，通过自然语言交互驱动模型构建与代码生成，同时保持模型工程的严谨性。
contributions: 首次提出vibe-driven model-based engineering概念，为融合LLM与MDE提供新思路。
概述了该新方法的关键概念，并指出了未来软件开发的机遇与开放挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 概念尚处于理论提出阶段，缺乏实证验证。
未详细说明如何具体实现LLM与MDE的集成，以及如何处理潜在冲突。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 概念新颖但缺乏实验和技术细节，与重点方向弱相关，适合快速浏览。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出“氛围驱动模型工程”概念，融合大语言模型与模型驱动工程以加速可靠复杂系统开发。

papers.title: LogitDynamics: Reliable ViT Error Detection from Layerwise Logit Trajectories
papers.abstract: Reliable confidence estimation is critical when deploying vision models. We study error prediction: determining whether an image classifier's output is correct using only signals from a single forward pass. Motivated by internal-signal hallucination detection in large language models, we investigate whether similar depth-wise signals exist in Vision Transformers (ViTs). We propose a simple method that models how class evidence evolves across layers. By attaching lightweight linear heads to intermediate layers, we extract features from the last L layers that capture both the logits of the predicted class and its top-K competitors, as well as statistics describing instability of top-ranked classes across depth. A linear probe trained on these features predicts the error indicator. Across datasets, our method improves or matches AUCPR over baselines and shows stronger cross-dataset generalization while requiring minimal additional computation.

analysis.tldr: 利用ViT层间logit轨迹进行可靠错误检测，方法简单且泛化性强。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉模型部署中需要可靠的置信度估计，现有方法在错误预测上精度不足，且跨数据集泛化能力弱。
analysis.problem: 如何仅利用单次前向传播的信号，准确预测ViT图像分类器的输出是否正确。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在ViT中间层附加轻量线性头，提取最后L层的logit特征（包括预测类及其top-K竞争类的logit，以及跨层排名不稳定性统计），用线性探针训练错误预测器。
contributions: 提出利用ViT层间logit轨迹进行错误检测的新方法
方法在多个数据集上提升或匹配AUCPR，且跨数据集泛化更强，计算开销小
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅适用于ViT架构，未验证其他视觉模型
依赖中间层线性头，可能增加少量内存开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，但创新性中等，实验细节不足，适合关注视觉模型可靠性方向的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用ViT层间logit轨迹进行可靠错误检测，方法简单且泛化性强。

papers.title: When Reasoning Models Hurt Behavioral Simulation: A Solver-Sampler Mismatch in Multi-Agent LLM Negotiation
papers.abstract: Behavioral simulation and strategic problem solving are different tasks. Large language models are increasingly explored as agents in policy-facing institutional simulations, but stronger reasoning need not improve behavioral sampling. We study this solver-sampler mismatch in three multi-agent negotiation environments: two trading-limits scenarios with different authority structures and a grid-curtailment case in emergency electricity management. Across two primary model families, native reasoning and often no reflection collapse toward authority-heavy outcomes. The sharpest case is DeepSeek native reasoning in the grid-curtailment transfer: it reaches action entropy 1.256 and a concession-arc rate of 0.933, yet still ends in authority decision in 15 of 15 runs. A direct OpenAI extension shows the same pressure at provider breadth: GPT-5.2 native reasoning ends in authority decisions in 45 of 45 runs across the three environments. Budget-matched no-reflection controls and orthogonal private-state controls remain rigid, while the negotiation-structured scaffold condition is the only condition that consistently opens negotiated outcomes. These diagnostics are failure screens within a fixed negotiation grammar, not evidence of external behavioral realism or policy-forecasting validity. The results show that neither more output space nor generic extra private state rescues solver-like sampler failure. For institutional simulation, solver strength and sampler qualification are different objectives: models should be evaluated for the behavioral role they are meant to play, not only for strategic capability.

analysis.tldr: LLM推理能力增强反而损害多智能体谈判中的行为模拟，揭示求解器与采样器的不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型越来越多地用于政策模拟中的智能体行为建模，但更强的推理能力并不必然改善行为采样的真实性，可能导致模拟结果偏离实际人类行为。
analysis.problem: 研究多智能体LLM谈判中，推理模型（求解器）与行为采样（采样器）之间的不匹配问题，即更强的推理能力反而导致行为模式僵化、偏向权威决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在三个多智能体谈判环境中，原生推理模型（如DeepSeek、GPT-5.2）的行为熵降低、让步弧率升高，但最终仍全部导向权威决策；预算匹配的无反思控制和正交私有状态控制同样僵化，只有谈判结构化支架条件能持续产生协商结果。这表明推理能力增强并未改善行为多样性，反而加剧了采样失败。
analysis.method: 通过三个多智能体谈判环境（两种交易限制场景和一种电网削减场景）进行实验，对比原生推理、无反思控制、正交私有状态控制和谈判结构化支架条件，分析求解器-采样器不匹配现象。
contributions: 揭示LLM推理模型在多智能体谈判中求解器与采样器的不匹配问题，即推理能力增强反而损害行为模拟的多样性。
提出谈判结构化支架作为唯一能持续产生协商结果的条件，为改进行为模拟提供方向。
强调在制度模拟中，模型应针对其扮演的行为角色进行评估，而非仅关注战略能力。
analysis.experiments: 在三个多智能体谈判环境（两种交易限制场景和一种电网削减场景）中，使用DeepSeek和OpenAI模型系列进行实验，包括原生推理、无反思控制、正交私有状态控制和谈判结构化支架条件。摘要提供了具体数据：DeepSeek原生推理在电网削减场景中行为熵1.256、让步弧率0.933，15/15次运行均以权威决策结束；GPT-5.2原生推理在三个环境中45/45次运行均以权威决策结束。
limitations: 实验仅在有限的多智能体谈判环境中进行，可能不适用于其他类型的模拟。
未提供谈判结构化支架的具体实现细节，难以直接复现。
未讨论模型规模或训练数据对结果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 论文揭示了推理模型在行为模拟中的关键缺陷，对LLM安全对齐和模拟应用有重要启示，实验设计清晰，但方法细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM推理能力增强反而损害多智能体谈判中的行为模拟，揭示求解器与采样器的不匹配问题。

papers.title: Language Prompt vs. Image Enhancement: Boosting Object Detection With CLIP in Hazy Environments
papers.abstract: Object detection in hazy environments is challenging because degraded objects are nearly invisible and their semantics are weakened by environmental noise, making it difficult for detectors to identify. Common approaches involve image enhancement to boost weakened semantics, but these methods are limited by the instability of enhanced modules. This paper proposes a novel solution by employing language prompts to enhance weakened semantics without image enhancement. Specifically, we design Approximation of Mutual Exclusion (AME) to provide credible weights for Cross-Entropy Loss, resulting in CLIP-guided Cross-Entropy Loss (CLIP-CE). The provided weights assess the semantic weakening of objects. Through the backpropagation of CLIP-CE, weakened semantics are enhanced, making degraded objects easier to detect. In addition, we present Fine-tuned AME (FAME) which adaptively fine-tunes the weight of AME based on the predicted confidence. The proposed FAME compensates for the imbalanced optimization in AME. Furthermore, we present HazyCOCO, a large-scale synthetic hazy dataset comprising 61258 images. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. The code and dataset will be released.

analysis.tldr: 用语言提示替代图像增强，通过CLIP引导的交叉熵损失提升雾霾环境下的目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 雾霾环境下目标检测因物体语义被削弱而困难，现有图像增强方法受限于增强模块的不稳定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖图像增强的情况下，有效增强雾霾中退化物体的语义信息以提升检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计近似互斥（AME）为交叉熵损失提供可信权重，形成CLIP引导的交叉熵损失（CLIP-CE），通过反向传播增强弱化语义；并提出微调AME（FAME）自适应调整权重以补偿优化不平衡。
contributions: 提出CLIP-CE损失，利用语言提示增强退化物体语义，避免图像增强的不稳定性。
提出FAME机制，自适应微调AME权重以平衡优化。
构建大规模合成雾霾数据集HazyCOCO（61258张图像）。
analysis.experiments: 在合成雾霾数据集上达到SOTA性能，代码和数据集将开源。
limitations: 依赖CLIP模型，可能受限于CLIP的领域适应性。
合成数据集与真实雾霾场景可能存在差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，用语言提示替代图像增强，实验SOTA，但依赖合成数据集。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用语言提示替代图像增强，通过CLIP引导的交叉熵损失提升雾霾环境下的目标检测性能。

papers.title: NTIRE 2026 The Second Challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images: Methods and Results
papers.abstract: This paper presents an overview of the NTIRE 2026 Second Challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images. Building upon the success of the first edition, this challenge attracted a wide range of impressive solutions, all developed and evaluated on our real-world Raindrop Clarity dataset~\cite{jin2024raindrop}. For this edition, we adjust the dataset with 14,139 images for training, 407 images for validation, and 593 images for testing. The primary goal of this challenge is to establish a strong and practical benchmark for the removal of raindrops under various illumination and focus conditions. In total, 168 teams have registered for the competition, and 17 teams submitted valid final solutions and fact sheets for the testing phase. The submitted methods achieved strong performance on the Raindrop Clarity dataset, demonstrating the growing progress in this challenging task.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026 第二届日夜双焦点图像雨滴去除挑战赛的方法与结果综述。
analysis.research_motivation: 雨滴去除是计算机视觉中的实际难题，尤其在日夜不同光照和双焦点条件下更具挑战性，现有方法缺乏统一基准。
analysis.problem: 建立并评估在多种光照和焦点条件下进行雨滴去除的实用基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，基于Raindrop Clarity数据集，收集并评估多种雨滴去除方法。
contributions: 发布了包含14139张训练图像、407张验证图像和593张测试图像的更新版Raindrop Clarity数据集。
通过挑战赛汇集了17个有效解决方案，展示了该任务的进展。

papers.title: Beyond Static Sandboxing: Learned Capability Governance for Autonomous AI Agents
papers.abstract: Autonomous AI agents built on open-source runtimes such as OpenClaw expose every available tool to every session by default, regardless of the task. A summarization task receives the same shell execution, subagent spawning, and credential access capabilities as a code deployment task, a 15x overprovision ratio that we call the capability overprovisioning problem. Existing defenses, including the NemoClaw container sandbox and the Cisco DefenseClaw skill scanner, address containment and threat detection but do not learn the minimum viable capability set for each task type. We present Aethelgard, a four layer adaptive governance framework that enforces least privilege for AI agents through a learned policy. Layer 1, the Capability Governor, dynamically scopes which tools the agent is aware of in each session. Layer 3, the Safety Router, intercepts tool calls before execution using a hybrid rule based and fine tuned classifier. Layer 2, the RL Learning Policy, trains a PPO policy on the accumulated audit log to learn the minimum viable skill set for each task type.

analysis.tldr: 提出Aethelgard框架，通过学习策略为自主AI代理实现最小权限治理，解决能力过度配置问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自主AI代理默认暴露所有工具，导致严重的能力过度配置（如15倍冗余），而现有防御方法（如容器沙箱、技能扫描器）仅关注隔离和威胁检测，无法为每个任务类型学习最小可行能力集。
analysis.problem: 如何为自主AI代理动态学习并执行每个任务类型的最小可行工具集，实现最小权限原则。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到自主AI代理存在能力过度配置问题：摘要任务与代码部署任务获得相同的shell执行、子代理生成和凭证访问能力，过度配置比例达15倍。
analysis.method: 提出Aethelgard四层自适应治理框架：第1层能力治理器动态限定会话中代理可感知的工具；第2层RL学习策略基于累积审计日志训练PPO策略，学习每个任务类型的最小可行技能集；第3层安全路由器在执行前使用混合规则和微调分类器拦截工具调用。
contributions: 首次提出并形式化自主AI代理的能力过度配置问题
提出Aethelgard四层自适应治理框架，通过学习策略实现最小权限
