papers.title: Removing Motion Artifact in MRI by Using a Perceptual Loss Driven Deep Learning Framework
papers.abstract: Purpose: Deep learning-based MRI artifact correction methods often demonstrate poor generalization to clinical data. This limitation largely stems from the inability of deep learning models in reliably distinguishing motion artifacts from true anatomical structures, due to insufficient awareness of artifact characteristics. To address this challenge, we proposed PERCEPT-Net, a deep learning framework that enhances structure preserving and suppresses artifact through dedicated perceptual supervision.Method: PERCEPT-Net is built on a residual U-Net backbone and incorporates three auxiliary components. The first multi-scale recovery module is designed to preserve both global anatomical context and fine structural details, while the second dual attention mechanisms further improve performance by prioritizing clinically relevant features. At the core of the framework is the third Motion Perceptual Loss (MPL), an artifact-aware perceptual supervision strategy that learns generalized representations of MRI motion artifacts, enabling the model to effectively suppress them while maintaining anatomical fidelity. The model is trained on a hybrid dataset comprising both real and simulated paired volumes, and its performance is validated on a prospective test set using a combination of quantitative metrics and qualitative assessments by experienced radiologists.Result: PERCEPT-Net outperformed state-of-the-art methods on clinical data. Ablation studies identified the Motion Perceptual Loss as the primary contributor to this performance, yielding significant improvements in structural consistency and tissue contrast, as reflected by higher SSIM and PSNR values. These findings were further corroborated by radiologist evaluations, which demonstrated significantly higher diagnostic confidence in the corrected volumes.

analysis.tldr: 提出PERCEPT-Net，通过运动感知损失（MPL）在MRI中去除运动伪影，优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于深度学习的MRI伪影校正方法在临床数据上泛化性差，主要因为模型难以区分运动伪影与真实解剖结构，缺乏对伪影特征的感知。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个深度学习框架，使其在抑制MRI运动伪影的同时保留真实解剖结构，并提升对临床数据的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有深度学习方法因对伪影特征感知不足，导致在临床数据上泛化性差，无法可靠区分伪影与真实结构。
analysis.method: 基于残差U-Net骨干，集成多尺度恢复模块、双重注意力机制和核心的运动感知损失（MPL），在混合数据集（真实+模拟）上训练。
contributions: 提出PERCEPT-Net框架，通过运动感知损失增强伪影抑制与结构保留。
在临床数据上超越现有方法，并通过消融实验验证MPL的关键作用。
analysis.experiments: 在包含真实和模拟配对数据集的混合数据上训练，并在前瞻性测试集上使用定量指标（SSIM、PSNR）和放射科医生定性评估验证。
limitations: 可能依赖混合数据集的构建质量，模拟伪影与真实伪影的差异可能影响泛化。
未提及计算效率或实时性，可能不适用于高吞吐量场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（运动感知损失）且临床验证有效，但未提供开源代码或详细数据集信息。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PERCEPT-Net，通过运动感知损失（MPL）在MRI中去除运动伪影，优于现有方法。

papers.title: Enhancing Fine-Grained Spatial Grounding in 3D CT Report Generation via Discriminative Guidance
papers.abstract: Vision--language models (VLMs) for radiology report generation (RRG) can produce long-form chest CT reports from volumetric scans and show strong potential to improve radiology workflow efficiency and consistency. However, existing methods face two key limitations: (i) training supervision is often coarse, aligning a whole CT volume with a full free-text report without explicit alignment for fine-grained attributes or pathology locations; and (ii) evaluation is typically holistic (lexical overlap, entity matching, or LLM-as-a-judge scores) and not diagnostic for spatial grounding. We propose \emph{Discriminative Cue-Prompting with Prompt Dropout (DCP-PD)}, a plug-and-play framework that distills fine-grained cues from free-text reports and uses them to guide report generation while mitigating shortcut reliance via prompt dropout. DCP-PD achieves state-of-the-art performance on CT-RATE, improving macro F1 from $=0.501$ to $0.603$ (20% relative), and substantially boosts out-of-distribution performance on Rad-ChestCT from F1 $=0.266$ to $0.503$ (89% relative). Finally, we introduce a hierarchical, location-aware question-set protocol (presence $\rightarrow$ laterality $\rightarrow$ lobe) to directly assess pathology-location grounding, showing that fine-grained spatial localization remains challenging even for models that score highly on current benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出DCP-PD框架，通过判别性提示和提示丢弃提升3D CT报告生成中的细粒度空间定位能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有放射学报告生成方法缺乏对细粒度属性和病理位置的显式对齐，且评估指标无法诊断空间定位能力，限制了临床实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何从自由文本报告中提取细粒度空间线索并用于引导报告生成，同时避免捷径依赖，并建立空间定位的评估协议。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出判别性提示与提示丢弃（DCP-PD）框架，从自由文本报告中蒸馏细粒度线索，通过提示丢弃缓解捷径依赖，作为即插即用模块引导报告生成。
contributions: 提出DCP-PD框架，利用判别性提示和提示丢弃提升细粒度空间定位。
在CT-RATE和Rad-ChestCT上取得SOTA，F1分别提升20%和89%。
引入层次化、位置感知的问答协议评估病理-位置定位，揭示现有基准的不足。
analysis.experiments: 在CT-RATE和Rad-ChestCT数据集上评估，CT-RATE宏F1从0.501提升至0.603，Rad-ChestCT F1从0.266提升至0.503。
limitations: 方法依赖自由文本报告中的显式空间线索，可能不适用于无结构化报告的场景。
层次化评估协议仅针对胸部CT，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验提升显著，引入新评估协议，与医学图像生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DCP-PD框架，通过判别性提示和提示丢弃提升3D CT报告生成中的细粒度空间定位能力。

papers.title: SignReasoner: Compositional Reasoning for Complex Traffic Sign Understanding via Functional Structure Units
papers.abstract: Accurate semantic understanding of complex traffic signs-including those with intricate layouts, multi-lingual text, and composite symbols-is critical for autonomous driving safety. Current models, both specialized small ones and large Vision Language Models (VLMs), suffer from a significant bottleneck: a lack of compositional generalization, leading to failure when encountering novel sign configurations. To overcome this, we propose SignReasoner, a novel paradigm that transforms general VLMs into expert traffic sign reasoners. Our core innovation is Functional Structure Unit (FSU), which shifts from common instance-based modeling to flexible function-based decomposition. By breaking down complex signs into minimal, core functional blocks (e.g., Direction, Notice, Lane), our model learns the underlying structural grammar, enabling robust generalization to unseen compositions. We define this decomposition as the FSU-Reasoning task and introduce a two-stage VLM post-training pipeline to maximize performance: Iterative Caption-FSU Distillation that enhances the model's accuracy in both FSU-reasoning and caption generation; FSU-GRPO that uses Tree Edit Distance (TED) to compute FSU differences as the rewards in GRPO algorithm, boosting reasoning abilities. Experiments on the newly proposed FSU-Reasoning benchmark, TrafficSignEval, show that SignReasoner achieves new SOTA with remarkable data efficiency and no architectural modification, significantly improving the traffic sign understanding in various VLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出功能结构单元（FSU）将复杂交通标志分解为功能块，结合两阶段VLM后训练实现组合泛化，在TrafficSignEval基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型（包括专用小模型和大型VLM）在理解复杂交通标志时缺乏组合泛化能力，无法处理新配置，威胁自动驾驶安全。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM具备对复杂交通标志的组合推理能力，以泛化到未见过的标志组合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前模型在遇到新颖标志配置时失败，原因是缺乏组合泛化；实例级建模限制了泛化能力。
analysis.method: 提出功能结构单元（FSU）进行功能级分解，定义FSU-Reasoning任务，并设计两阶段VLM后训练：迭代Caption-FSU蒸馏和基于树编辑距离（TED）的FSU-GRPO强化学习。
contributions: 提出FSU概念，将实例级建模转为功能级分解，提升组合泛化能力。
设计两阶段VLM后训练流程（蒸馏+GRPO），无需修改架构即可提升推理能力。
构建TrafficSignEval基准，实验证明SignReasoner在数据效率和新SOTA上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在TrafficSignEval基准上评估，SignReasoner达到新SOTA，且数据效率高，无需架构修改。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量FSU标注数据。
泛化到其他领域（如非交通标志）的能力未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（FSU+两阶段训练）且针对自动驾驶安全关键问题，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出功能结构单元（FSU）将复杂交通标志分解为功能块，结合两阶段VLM后训练实现组合泛化，在TrafficSignEval基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Safety Guarantees in Zero-Shot Reinforcement Learning for Cascade Dynamical Systems
papers.abstract: This paper considers the problem of zero-shot safety guarantees for cascade dynamical systems. These are systems where a subset of the states (the inner states) affects the dynamics of the remaining states (the outer states) but not vice-versa. We define safety as remaining on a set deemed safe for all times with high probability. We propose to train a safe RL policy on a reduced-order model, which ignores the dynamics of the inner states, but it treats it as an action that influences the outer state. Thus, reducing the complexity of the training. When deployed in the full system the trained policy is combined with a low-level controller whose task is to track the reference provided by the RL policy. Our main theoretical contribution is a bound on the safe probability in the full-order system. In particular, we establish the interplay between the probability of remaining safe after the zero-shot deployment and the quality of the tracking of the inner states. We validate our theoretical findings on a quadrotor navigation task, demonstrating that the preservation of the safety guarantees is tied to the bandwidth and tracking capabilities of the low-level controller.

analysis.tldr: 针对级联动力系统，提出一种零样本安全强化学习方法，通过降阶模型训练策略并绑定低层跟踪控制器，给出安全概率的理论界。
analysis.research_motivation: 级联动力系统中，内状态影响外状态但反之不成立，直接训练安全RL策略面临高维状态空间和计算复杂性问题，且零样本部署时安全保证难以量化。
analysis.problem: 如何在零样本部署下，为级联动力系统提供高概率的安全保证，并量化安全概率与内状态跟踪质量的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在忽略内状态动力学的降阶模型上训练安全RL策略，将内状态视为影响外状态的动作；部署时结合低层跟踪控制器，并推导全阶系统安全概率的理论界。
contributions: 提出一种针对级联动力系统的零样本安全RL框架，利用降阶模型降低训练复杂度。
给出全阶系统安全概率的理论界，揭示安全保证与内状态跟踪质量之间的定量关系。
在四旋翼导航任务上验证理论结果，表明安全保证依赖于低层控制器的带宽和跟踪能力。
analysis.experiments: 在四旋翼导航任务上验证理论结果，实验表明安全保证与低层控制器的带宽和跟踪能力相关。
limitations: 理论界可能依赖于特定的系统结构假设（如级联形式）。
低层控制器的跟踪质量在实际中可能难以精确保证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，但应用场景较专，适合相关领域读者精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对级联动力系统，提出一种零样本安全强化学习方法，通过降阶模型训练策略并绑定低层跟踪控制器，给出安全概率的理论界。

papers.title: A Queueing-Theoretic Framework for Dynamic Attack Surfaces: Data-Integrated Risk Analysis and Adaptive Defense
papers.abstract: We develop a queueing-theoretic framework to model the temporal evolution of cyber-attack surfaces, where the number of active vulnerabilities is represented as the backlog of a queue. Vulnerabilities arrive as they are discovered or created, and leave the system when they are patched or successfully exploited. Building on this model, we study how automation affects attack and defense dynamics by introducing an AI amplification factor that scales arrival, exploit, and patching rates. Our analysis shows that even symmetric automation can increase the rate of successful exploits. We validate the model using vulnerability data collected from an open source software supply chain and show that it closely matches real-world attack surface dynamics. Empirical results reveal heavy-tailed patching times, which we prove induce long-range dependence in vulnerability backlog and help explain persistent cyber risk. Utilizing our queueing abstraction for the attack surface, we develop a systematic approach for cyber risk mitigation. We formulate the dynamic defense problem as a constrained Markov decision process with resource-budget and switching-cost constraints, and develop a reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm that achieves provably near-optimal regret. Numerical experiments validate the approach and demonstrate that our adaptive RL-based defense policies significantly reduce successful exploits and mitigate heavy-tail queue events. Using trace-driven experiments on the ARVO dataset, we show that the proposed RL-based defense policy reduces the average number of active vulnerabilities in a software supply chain by over 90% compared to existing defense practices, without increasing the overall maintenance budget. Our results allow defenders to quantify cumulative exposure risk under long-range dependent attack dynamics and to design adaptive defense strategies with provable efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 用排队论建模攻击面动态，结合AI放大因子和强化学习实现自适应防御，在软件供应链数据上验证有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 网络攻击面随时间动态演化，现有方法缺乏对漏洞到达和修复过程的时序建模，难以量化累积暴露风险并设计自适应防御策略。
analysis.problem: 如何建模攻击面的时间演化，并基于此设计资源约束下可证明近优的自适应防御策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实证发现漏洞修复时间呈重尾分布，导致漏洞积压具有长程依赖性，解释了持续性网络风险。
analysis.method: 将攻击面建模为排队系统，引入AI放大因子刻画自动化对攻防速率的影响；将防御问题形式化为带资源预算和切换成本约束的马尔可夫决策过程，并设计近优遗憾的强化学习算法。
contributions: 提出基于排队论的攻击面动态建模框架，并利用真实漏洞数据验证其准确性。
形式化自适应防御为约束MDP，开发可证明近优遗憾的RL算法，在ARVO数据集上减少90%以上活跃漏洞。
analysis.experiments: 在开源软件供应链漏洞数据和ARVO数据集上进行数值实验和轨迹驱动实验，验证模型拟合度和防御策略效果。
limitations: 框架假设漏洞到达和修复过程为泊松/指数分布，实际可能更复杂。
AI放大因子为线性缩放，未考虑非线性或对抗性自动化行为。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（排队论+RL），实验充分且效果显著，但属于网络安全应用，与核心ML方向距离中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用排队论建模攻击面动态，结合AI放大因子和强化学习实现自适应防御，在软件供应链数据上验证有效性。

papers.title: CodaRAG: Connecting the Dots with Associativity Inspired by Complementary Learning
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle with knowledge-intensive tasks due to hallucinations and fragmented reasoning over dispersed information. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds generation in external sources, existing methods often treat evidence as isolated units, failing to reconstruct the logical chains that connect these dots. Inspired by Complementary Learning Systems (CLS), we propose CodaRAG, a framework that evolves retrieval from passive lookup into active associative discovery. CodaRAG operates via a three-stage pipeline: (1) Knowledge Consolidation to unify fragmented extractions into a stable memory substrate; (2) Associative Navigation to traverse the graph via multi-dimensional pathways-semantic, contextualized, and functional-explicitly recovering dispersed evidence chains; and (3) Interference Elimination to prune hyper-associative noise, ensuring a coherent, high-precision reasoning context. On GraphRAG-Bench, CodaRAG achieves absolute gains of 7-10% in retrieval recall and 3-11% in generation accuracy. These results demonstrate CodaRAG's superior ability to systematically robustify associative evidence retrieval for factual, reasoning, and creative tasks.

analysis.tldr: CodaRAG通过互补学习系统启发，将检索从被动查找变为主动关联发现，在GraphRAG-Bench上提升检索召回率7-10%、生成准确率3-11%。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在知识密集型任务中因幻觉和碎片化推理而表现不佳，现有RAG方法将证据视为孤立单元，无法重建连接这些点的逻辑链。
analysis.problem: 如何让检索增强生成系统能够主动发现并恢复分散证据之间的关联链，从而提升推理的连贯性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CodaRAG框架包含三个阶段：知识整合（将碎片化提取统一为稳定记忆）、关联导航（通过语义、上下文和功能等多维路径遍历图以恢复证据链）、干扰消除（修剪超关联噪声以保持推理上下文连贯）。
contributions: 提出CodaRAG框架，将检索从被动查找转变为主动关联发现。
在GraphRAG-Bench上实现检索召回率7-10%和生成准确率3-11%的绝对提升。
analysis.experiments: 在GraphRAG-Bench上评估，CodaRAG在检索召回率和生成准确率上分别取得7-10%和3-11%的绝对增益。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的知识图谱构建。
关联导航的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与RAG和LLM推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CodaRAG通过互补学习系统启发，将检索从被动查找变为主动关联发现，在GraphRAG-Bench上提升检索召回率7-10%、生成准确率3-11%。

papers.title: DiningBench: A Hierarchical Multi-view Benchmark for Perception and Reasoning in the Dietary Domain
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have revolutionized general visual understanding. However, their application in the food domain remains constrained by benchmarks that rely on coarse-grained categories, single-view imagery, and inaccurate metadata. To bridge this gap, we introduce DiningBench, a hierarchical, multi-view benchmark designed to evaluate VLMs across three levels of cognitive complexity: Fine-Grained Classification, Nutrition Estimation, and Visual Question Answering. Unlike previous datasets, DiningBench comprises 3,021 distinct dishes with an average of 5.27 images per entry, incorporating fine-grained "hard" negatives from identical menus and rigorous, verification-based nutritional data. We conduct an extensive evaluation of 29 state-of-the-art open-source and proprietary models. Our experiments reveal that while current VLMs excel at general reasoning, they struggle significantly with fine-grained visual discrimination and precise nutritional reasoning. Furthermore, we systematically investigate the impact of multi-view inputs and Chain-of-Thought reasoning, identifying five primary failure modes. DiningBench serves as a challenging testbed to drive the next generation of food-centric VLM research. All codes are released in https://github.com/meituan/DiningBench.

analysis.tldr: DiningBench是一个分层多视图基准，用于评估VLM在饮食领域的细粒度分类、营养估计和视觉问答能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在食品领域的基准依赖粗粒度类别、单视图图像和不准确的元数据，限制了模型在饮食领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够评估VLM在饮食领域细粒度感知和推理能力的多视图、分层基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前VLM在通用推理上表现优异，但在细粒度视觉辨别和精确营养推理上存在显著困难，并识别出五种主要失败模式。
analysis.method: 构建包含3,021道菜品、平均每道5.27张图像的分层多视图基准，涵盖细粒度分类、营养估计和视觉问答三个认知复杂度级别，并引入硬负样本和验证性营养数据。
contributions: 提出了DiningBench，一个分层多视图基准，用于评估VLM在饮食领域的细粒度感知和推理能力。
对29个开源和专有模型进行了广泛评估，揭示了当前VLM在细粒度视觉辨别和营养推理上的不足。
系统研究了多视图输入和思维链推理的影响，并识别了五种主要失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 对29个开源和专有模型进行了评估，包括多视图输入和思维链推理的影响分析，并识别了五种主要失败模式。
limitations: 基准仅涵盖饮食领域，可能不直接推广到其他领域。
未提供模型在真实场景中的部署效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，实验全面，对饮食领域VLM研究有重要推动作用。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DiningBench是一个分层多视图基准，用于评估VLM在饮食领域的细粒度分类、营养估计和视觉问答能力。

papers.title: Point2Pose: Occlusion-Recovering 6D Pose Tracking and 3D Reconstruction for Multiple Unknown Objects Via 2D Point Trackers
papers.abstract: We present Point2Pose, a model-free method for causal 6D pose tracking of multiple rigid objects from monocular RGB-D video. Initialized only from sparse image points on the objects to be tracked, our approach tracks multiple unseen objects without requiring object CAD models or category priors. Point2Pose leverages a 2D point tracker to obtain long-range correspondences, enabling instant recovery after complete occlusion. Simultaneously, the system incrementally reconstructs an online Truncated Signed Distance Function (TSDF) representation of the tracked targets. Alongside the method, we introduce a new multi-object tracking dataset comprising both simulation and real-world sequences, with motion-capture ground truth for evaluation. Experiments show that Point2Pose achieves performance comparable to the state-of-the-art methods on a severe-occlusion benchmark, while additionally supporting multi-object tracking and recovery from complete occlusion, capabilities that are not supported by previous model-free tracking approaches.

analysis.tldr: Point2Pose利用2D点跟踪器实现多未知物体的6D姿态跟踪与3D重建，支持完全遮挡后恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有6D姿态跟踪方法通常需要物体CAD模型或类别先验，且难以处理完全遮挡和多物体场景，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有物体模型或类别先验的情况下，从单目RGB-D视频中因果跟踪多个未知物体的6D姿态，并在完全遮挡后即时恢复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用2D点跟踪器获取长程对应关系，结合在线TSDF重建，实现遮挡恢复和多物体跟踪。
contributions: 提出Point2Pose，一种无需模型或类别先验的6D姿态跟踪方法，支持多物体和遮挡恢复。
引入新的多物体跟踪数据集，包含仿真和真实序列，并提供动作捕捉真值。
analysis.experiments: 在严重遮挡基准上性能与SOTA相当，并额外支持多物体跟踪和完全遮挡恢复，而先前无模型方法不支持。
limitations: 依赖RGB-D输入，可能受深度传感器噪声影响。
2D点跟踪器在极端外观变化下可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，解决了无模型多物体跟踪和遮挡恢复的难题，但实验信息有限，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Point2Pose利用2D点跟踪器实现多未知物体的6D姿态跟踪与3D重建，支持完全遮挡后恢复。

papers.title: Neural Stochastic Processes for Satellite Precipitation Refinement
papers.abstract: Accurate precipitation estimation is critical for flood forecasting, water resource management, and disaster preparedness. Satellite products provide global hourly coverage but contain systematic biases; ground-based gauges are accurate at point locations but too sparse for direct gridded correction. Existing methods fuse these sources by interpolating gauge observations onto the satellite grid, but treat each time step independently and therefore discard temporal structure in precipitation fields. We propose Neural Stochastic Process (NSP), a model that pairs a Neural Process encoder conditioning on arbitrary sets of gauge observations with a latent Neural SDE on a 2D spatial representation. NSP is trained under a single variational objective with simulation-free cost. We also introduce QPEBench, a benchmark of 43{,}756 hourly samples over the Contiguous United States (2021--2025) with four aligned data sources and six evaluation metrics. On QPEBench, NSP outperforms 13 baselines across all six metrics and surpasses JAXA's operational gauge-calibrated product. An additional experiment on Kyushu, Japan confirms generalization to a different region with independent data sources.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经随机过程（NSP）融合卫星与地面雨量计数据，实现高精度降水估计，并发布QPEBench基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 降水估计对洪水预报和水资源管理至关重要，但卫星产品存在系统偏差，地面雨量计稀疏且无法直接网格化校正，现有方法忽略时间结构。
analysis.problem: 如何融合卫星降水产品和稀疏地面雨量计观测，生成高分辨率、时间连续的网格化降水估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出神经随机过程（NSP），结合神经过程编码器（基于任意雨量计观测）和潜在神经SDE（在2D空间表示上），通过单一变分目标训练，无需模拟。
contributions: 提出NSP模型，利用神经过程和神经SDE融合多源降水数据，捕获时空结构。
构建QPEBench基准，包含43,756小时样本、四个对齐数据源和六个评估指标。
在美国本土和日本九州区域验证，NSP超越13个基线方法和JAXA业务产品。
analysis.experiments: 在QPEBench上，NSP在所有六个指标上优于13个基线方法，并超越JAXA的雨量计校准产品；在日本九州区域的额外实验证实了泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量雨量计数据分布，稀疏区域性能未知。
神经SDE的训练和推理计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新（神经过程+神经SDE）且实验充分，但主题偏气候应用，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经随机过程（NSP）融合卫星与地面雨量计数据，实现高精度降水估计，并发布QPEBench基准。

papers.title: CWCD: Category-Wise Contrastive Decoding for Structured Medical Report Generation
papers.abstract: Interpreting chest X-rays is inherently challenging due to the overlap between anatomical structures and the subtle presentation of many clinically significant pathologies, making accurate diagnosis time-consuming even for experienced radiologists. Recent radiology-focused foundation models, such as LLaVA-Rad and Maira-2, have positioned multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) at the forefront of automated radiology report generation (RRG). However, despite these advances, current foundation models generate reports in a single forward pass. This decoding strategy diminishes attention to visual tokens and increases reliance on language priors as generation proceeds, which in turn introduces spurious pathology co-occurrences in the generated reports. To mitigate these limitations, we propose Category-Wise Contrastive Decoding (CWCD), a novel and modular framework designed to enhance structured radiology report generation (SRRG). Our approach introduces category-specific parameterization and generates category-wise reports by contrasting normal X-rays with masked X-rays using category-specific visual prompts. Experimental results demonstrate that CWCD consistently outperforms baseline methods across both clinical efficacy and natural language generation metrics. An ablation study further elucidates the contribution of each architectural component to overall performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出类别级对比解码（CWCD）框架，通过类别特定参数化和对比解码提升结构化放射学报告生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在放射学报告生成中采用单次前向解码，导致对视觉token关注不足、过度依赖语言先验，产生虚假病理共现，影响诊断准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何缓解单次解码中视觉注意力衰减和语言先验偏差，减少虚假病理共现，提升结构化放射学报告生成的临床准确性和自然语言质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单次前向解码策略会随着生成过程减弱对视觉token的注意力，增加对语言先验的依赖，从而引入虚假病理共现。
analysis.method: 提出类别级对比解码（CWCD），引入类别特定参数化，通过对比正常X光片与掩码X光片（使用类别特定视觉提示）生成类别级报告。
contributions: 提出CWCD框架，通过类别级对比解码增强结构化放射学报告生成。
引入类别特定参数化和视觉提示对比机制，有效缓解虚假病理共现。
在临床效能和自然语言指标上均优于基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在放射学报告生成任务上，CWCD在临床效能和自然语言生成指标上均优于基线方法，消融实验验证了各组件贡献。
limitations: 可能依赖特定类别定义，泛化到新类别需重新定义。
对比解码增加计算开销，实时应用可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且针对医疗报告生成痛点，实验验证有效，与VLM/MLLM方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出类别级对比解码（CWCD）框架，通过类别特定参数化和对比解码提升结构化放射学报告生成质量。

papers.title: IMPACT: A Dataset for Multi-Granularity Human Procedural Action Understanding in Industrial Assembly
papers.abstract: We introduce IMPACT, a synchronized five-view RGB-D dataset for deployment-oriented industrial procedural understanding, built around real assembly and disassembly of a commercial angle grinder with professional-grade tools. To our knowledge, IMPACT is the first real industrial assembly benchmark that jointly provides synchronized ego-exo RGB-D capture, decoupled bimanual annotation, compliance-aware state tracking, and explicit anomaly--recovery supervision within a single real industrial workflow. It comprises 112 trials from 13 participants totaling 39.5 hours, with multi-route execution governed by a partial-order prerequisite graph, a six-category anomaly taxonomy, and operator cognitive load measured via NASA-TLX. The annotation hierarchy links hand-specific atomic actions to coarse procedural steps, component assembly states, and per-hand compliance phases, with synchronized null spans across views to decouple perceptual limitations from algorithmic failure. Systematic baselines reveal fundamental limitations that remain invisible to single-task benchmarks, particularly under realistic deployment conditions that involve incomplete observations, flexible execution paths, and corrective behavior. The full dataset, annotations, and evaluation code are available at https://github.com/Kratos-Wen/IMPACT.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向工业装配的多视角RGB-D数据集，支持细粒度过程理解与异常恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工业装配数据集缺乏真实场景的多视角、双任务、异常恢复等关键要素，导致算法在部署时面临根本性局限。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个真实工业装配场景下的多粒度过程理解基准，以评估算法在部分观测、灵活路径和纠正行为等部署条件下的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单任务基准无法揭示部署条件下的根本局限，如不完整观测、灵活执行路径和纠正行为。
analysis.method: 构建包含同步五视角RGB-D、双任务标注、合规感知状态跟踪和异常恢复监督的数据集，并基于部分序前置图、六类异常分类和NASA-TLX认知负荷测量进行系统基线评估。
contributions: 首个提供同步ego-exo RGB-D、双任务标注、合规感知状态跟踪和异常恢复监督的真实工业装配基准。
揭示了单任务基准无法发现的部署条件局限，并开源完整数据集、标注和评估代码。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到系统基线揭示了单任务基准不可见的局限。
limitations: 数据集仅涉及一种商用角磨机，泛化性有待验证。
基线方法可能未覆盖所有最新算法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集创新性强且实用，但领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向工业装配的多视角RGB-D数据集，支持细粒度过程理解与异常恢复。

papers.title: Rethinking Video Human-Object Interaction: Set Prediction over Time for Unified Detection and Anticipation
papers.abstract: Video-based human-object interaction (HOI) understanding requires both detecting ongoing interactions and anticipating their future evolution. However, existing methods usually treat anticipation as a downstream forecasting task built on externally constructed human-object pairs, limiting joint reasoning between detection and prediction. In addition, sparse keyframe annotations in current benchmarks can temporally misalign nominal future labels from actual future dynamics, reducing the reliability of anticipation evaluation. To address these issues, we introduce DETAnt-HOI, a temporally corrected benchmark derived from VidHOI and Action Genome for more faithful multi-horizon evaluation, and HOI-DA, a pair-centric framework that jointly performs subject-object localization, present HOI detection, and future anticipation by modeling future interactions as residual transitions from current pair states. Experiments show consistent improvements in both detection and anticipation, with larger gains at longer horizons. Our results highlight that anticipation is most effective when learned jointly with detection as a structural constraint on pair-level video representation learning. Benchmark and code will be publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一检测与预测的HOI框架DETAnt-HOI，通过将未来交互建模为当前状态的残差变换，在修正后的基准上实现长时域性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将交互预测视为下游任务，依赖外部构建的人-物对，限制了检测与预测的联合推理；同时，现有基准的关键帧标注稀疏，导致未来标签与真实动态时间错位，降低评估可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现视频中人-物交互的联合检测与未来预测，并解决基准标注的时间错位问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当预测与检测作为结构约束联合学习时，交互预测最有效，且长时域增益更大。
analysis.method: 提出HOI-DA框架，以人-物对为中心，联合进行主体-客体定位、当前HOI检测和未来预测，将未来交互建模为当前对状态的残差变换。同时构建DETAnt-HOI基准，对VidHOI和Action Genome进行时间校正，实现更忠实的多时域评估。
contributions: 提出HOI-DA，首个统一检测与预测的成对中心框架，将未来交互建模为残差变换。
构建DETAnt-HOI，一个时间校正的基准，用于更可靠的多时域HOI评估。
实验表明联合学习在检测和预测上均有一致提升，长时域增益更大。
analysis.experiments: 在VidHOI和Action Genome的校正版本上进行实验，显示检测和预测性能一致提升，长时域增益更大。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的人-物对检测，对遮挡或小目标场景鲁棒性未知。
残差变换假设未来交互与当前状态强相关，可能不适用于突然变化的交互。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（统一检测与预测）且构建了校正基准，与视频理解方向相关，但摘要未提供实验细节，保守推荐。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一检测与预测的HOI框架DETAnt-HOI，通过将未来交互建模为当前状态的残差变换，在修正后的基准上实现长时域性能提升。

papers.title: Intent-aligned Formal Specification Synthesis via Traceable Refinement
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly used to generate code from natural language, but ensuring correctness remains challenging. Formal verification offers a principled way to obtain such guarantees by proving that a program satisfies a formal specification. However, specifications are frequently missing in real-world codebases, and writing high-quality specifications remains expensive and expertise-intensive. We present VeriSpecGen, a traceable refinement framework that synthesizes intent-aligned specifications in Lean through requirement-level attribution and localized repair. VeriSpecGen decomposes natural language into atomic requirements and generates requirement-targeted tests with explicit traceability maps to validate generated specifications. When validation fails, traceability maps attribute failures to specific requirements, enabling targeted clause-level repairs. VeriSpecGen achieve 86.6% on VERINA SpecGen task using Claude Opus 4.5, improving over baselines by up to 31.8 points across different model families and scales. Beyond inference-time gains, we generate 343K training examples from VeriSpecGen refinement trajectories and demonstrate that training on these trajectories substantially improves specification synthesis by 62-106% relative and transfers gains to general reasoning abilities.

analysis.tldr: VeriSpecGen通过可追溯精炼框架，将自然语言分解为原子需求并生成可追溯测试，实现与意图对齐的Lean形式规约合成，在VERINA SpecGen任务上提升31.8个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型生成代码时正确性难以保证，形式化验证需要高质量规约，但规约常缺失且编写成本高、需要专业知识。
analysis.problem: 如何从自然语言描述中自动合成与用户意图对齐的形式化规约，并确保其正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: VeriSpecGen将自然语言分解为原子需求，生成带有显式可追溯映射的需求定向测试来验证规约；验证失败时，可追溯映射将失败归因到特定需求，实现子句级修复。
contributions: 提出可追溯精炼框架VeriSpecGen，通过需求级归因和局部修复合成与意图对齐的Lean规约。
在VERINA SpecGen任务上使用Claude Opus 4.5达到86.6%，相比基线提升31.8个百分点。
从精炼轨迹生成343K训练样本，训练后规约合成能力相对提升62-106%，并泛化到通用推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 在VERINA SpecGen任务上评估，使用Claude Opus 4.5达到86.6%，跨不同模型家族和规模相比基线提升最多31.8个百分点；训练数据实验显示相对提升62-106%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定形式化语言Lean，泛化到其他语言需适配。
可追溯映射的构建和维护可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与LLM推理和形式化验证方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VeriSpecGen通过可追溯精炼框架，将自然语言分解为原子需求并生成可追溯测试，实现与意图对齐的Lean形式规约合成，在VERINA SpecGen任务上提升31.8个百分点。

papers.title: FishRoPE: Projective Rotary Position Embeddings for Omnidirectional Visual Perception
papers.abstract: Vision foundation models (VFMs) and Bird's Eye View (BEV) representation have advanced visual perception substantially, yet their internal spatial representations assume the rectilinear geometry of pinhole cameras. Fisheye cameras, widely deployed on production autonomous vehicles for their surround-view coverage, exhibit severe radial distortion that renders these representations geometrically inconsistent. At the same time, the scarcity of large-scale fisheye annotations makes retraining foundation models from scratch impractical. We present \ours, a lightweight framework that adapts frozen VFMs to fisheye geometry through two components: a frozen DINOv2 backbone with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) that transfers rich self-supervised features to fisheye without task-specific pretraining, and Fisheye Rotary Position Embedding (FishRoPE), which reparameterizes the attention mechanism in the spherical coordinates of the fisheye projection so that both self-attention and cross-attention operate on angular separation rather than pixel distance. FishRoPE is architecture-agnostic, introduces negligible computational overhead, and naturally reduces to the standard formulation under pinhole geometry. We evaluate \ours on WoodScape 2D detection (54.3 mAP) and SynWoodScapes BEV segmentation (65.1 mIoU), where it achieves state-of-the-art results on both benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出FishRoPE，通过球面坐标重参数化旋转位置编码，使冻结的视觉基础模型适应鱼眼图像几何，在WoodScape检测和BEV分割上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 鱼眼相机在自动驾驶中广泛使用，但其径向畸变导致现有视觉基础模型（基于针孔相机几何）的空间表示不一致；同时大规模鱼眼标注数据稀缺，从头训练不现实。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，使冻结的视觉基础模型适应鱼眼相机的非针孔几何，实现一致的视觉感知。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 轻量框架，包含冻结的DINOv2骨干加LoRA适配，以及FishRoPE——在鱼眼投影的球面坐标中重参数化注意力机制的位置编码，使自注意力和交叉注意力基于角距离而非像素距离。
contributions: 提出FishRoPE，一种架构无关的旋转位置编码，使冻结VFM适应鱼眼几何，计算开销可忽略。
在WoodScape 2D检测和SynWoodScapes BEV分割上达到SOTA，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在WoodScape 2D检测（54.3 mAP）和SynWoodScapes BEV分割（65.1 mIoU）上评估，达到SOTA。
limitations: 仅验证了2D检测和BEV分割任务，其他鱼眼视觉任务（如深度估计、跟踪）未涉及。
依赖DINOv2和LoRA，可能在其他VFM上表现不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，在鱼眼视觉任务上取得SOTA，与VLM/视觉感知方向相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FishRoPE，通过球面坐标重参数化旋转位置编码，使冻结的视觉基础模型适应鱼眼图像几何，在WoodScape检测和BEV分割上达到SOTA。

papers.title: TrajOnco: a multi-agent framework for temporal reasoning over longitudinal EHR for multi-cancer early detection
papers.abstract: Accurate estimation of cancer risk from longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs) could support earlier detection and improved care, but modeling such complex patient trajectories remains challenging. We present TrajOnco, a training-free, multi-agent large language model (LLM) framework designed for scalable multi-cancer early detection. Using a chain-of-agents architecture with long-term memory, TrajOnco performs temporal reasoning over sequential clinical events to generate patient-level summaries, evidence-linked rationales, and predicted risk scores. We evaluated TrajOnco on de-identified Truveta EHR data across 15 cancer types using matched case-control cohorts, predicting risk of cancer diagnosis at 1 year. In zero-shot evaluation, TrajOnco achieved AUROCs of 0.64-0.80, performing comparably to supervised machine learning in a lung cancer benchmark while demonstrating better temporal reasoning than single-agent LLMs. The multi-agent design also enabled effective temporal reasoning with smaller-capacity models such as GPT-4.1-mini. The fidelity of TrajOnco's output was validated through human evaluation. Furthermore, TrajOnco's interpretable reasoning outputs can be aggregated to reveal population-level risk patterns that align with established clinical knowledge. These findings highlight the potential of multi-agent LLMs to execute interpretable temporal reasoning over longitudinal EHRs, advancing both scalable multi-cancer early detection and clinical insight generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个无需训练的多智能体LLM框架TrajOnco，用于从纵向电子病历中进行时间推理以实现多癌早期检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 纵向电子病历中的复杂患者轨迹建模困难，现有方法难以有效进行时间推理，且缺乏可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何从纵向电子病历中准确估计癌症风险，实现可扩展的多癌早期检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多智能体设计比单智能体LLM在时间推理上表现更好，且小容量模型也能有效推理。
analysis.method: 提出TrajOnco，一个无需训练的多智能体LLM框架，采用链式智能体架构和长期记忆，对序列临床事件进行时间推理，生成患者级摘要、证据链接的理由和预测风险评分。
contributions: 提出TrajOnco，首个用于多癌早期检测的无需训练的多智能体LLM框架。
在15种癌症类型上验证了其有效性，零样本AUROC达0.64-0.80，与监督学习相当。
展示了可解释的推理输出，可聚合揭示与临床知识一致的人群风险模式。
analysis.experiments: 在去标识化的Truveta EHR数据上，针对15种癌症类型使用匹配病例对照队列，预测1年癌症诊断风险。零样本评估AUROC为0.64-0.80，在肺癌基准上与监督学习相当，并通过人工评估验证输出保真度。
limitations: AUROC范围0.64-0.80，部分癌症类型性能可能有限。
依赖LLM的推理能力，可能受限于模型容量和数据质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（多智能体时间推理）且应用价值高（多癌早期检测），实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个无需训练的多智能体LLM框架TrajOnco，用于从纵向电子病历中进行时间推理以实现多癌早期检测。

papers.title: GTASA: Ground Truth Annotations for Spatiotemporal Analysis, Evaluation and Training of Video Models
papers.abstract: Generating complex multi-actor scenario videos remains difficult even for state-of-the-art neural generators, while evaluating them is hard due to the lack of ground truth for physical plausibility and semantic faithfulness. We introduce GTASA, a corpus of multi-actor videos with per-frame spatial relation graphs and event-level temporal mappings, and the system that produced it based on Graphs of Events in Space and Time (GEST): GEST-Engine. We compare our method with both open and closed source neural generators and prove both qualitatively (human evaluation of physical validity and semantic alignment) and quantitatively (via training video captioning models) the clear advantages of our method. Probing four frozen video encoders across 11 spatiotemporal reasoning tasks enabled by GTASA's exact 3D ground truth reveals that self-supervised encoders encode spatial structure significantly better than VLM visual encoders.

analysis.tldr: 提出GTASA数据集和GEST-Engine系统，通过精确时空标注在视频生成和评估中优于神经生成器。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经视频生成器难以生成复杂多演员场景视频，且缺乏物理合理性和语义忠实性的真实标注，导致评估困难。
analysis.problem: 缺乏具有精确时空标注的多演员视频数据集，以支持视频模型的训练、评估和时空推理分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自监督视频编码器在编码空间结构上显著优于VLM视觉编码器，基于GTASA的11项时空推理任务探针实验揭示。
analysis.method: 基于时空事件图（GEST）的引擎GEST-Engine，生成带逐帧空间关系图和事件级时间映射的多演员视频数据集GTASA。
contributions: 构建了GTASA数据集，包含多演员视频的逐帧空间关系图和事件级时间映射。
开发了GEST-Engine系统，可生成具有精确时空标注的视频。
通过人类评估和视频字幕模型训练证明GTASA在物理有效性和语义对齐上优于神经生成器。
利用GTASA的精确3D标注探针四个冻结视频编码器，揭示自监督编码器在空间结构编码上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了人类评估（物理有效性和语义对齐）和视频字幕模型训练，以及11项时空推理任务的编码器探针实验。
limitations: 可能仅适用于多演员场景，泛化性未知。
GEST-Engine的生成效率或可扩展性未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集创新性强，对视频生成和评估有重要价值，但技术细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GTASA数据集和GEST-Engine系统，通过精确时空标注在视频生成和评估中优于神经生成器。
